Title: Checkout Data Analyst - (Hybrid)
Description:
As you contemplate your future, you might be asking yourself, " What's the next step?’’ Start your journey with us!

We're seeking highly skilled technical Data Analysts for the Checkout team who are passionate about data, automation, analysis, and innovation, and who love working in a collaborative and agile environment. If you're ready to soar, we're ready to take you there.

Why eDreams ODIGEO

We’re the world's leading travel subscription platform.


We pioneered Prime, the first and world’s leading travel subscription programme since launching in 2017.
Millions of Prime members every year across multiple markets.
5 brands: eDreams, GO Voyages, Opodo, Travellink, and the metasearch engine Liligo
This entire Prime experience is powered by a proprietary, industry-leading AI platform that delivers a smarter, hyper-personalised service and comprehensive travel experience globally to its members.
Diversity is our strength that’s why our eDOers are coming from different nationalities from all continents – 99% permanent contracts



Prime members are subscribed to global travel, gaining access to a comprehensive multi-product offering for all their travel needs—including hotels, rail, flights, dynamic packages and car rental, among others— compounded by industry-leading flexibility features and exclusive, member-only benefits.

What you will do:

The Role's Key Responsibilities and Tasks

As an eDOer, you will have clear objectives, great challenges and a clear overview of how your work contributes to the global company project and its customers. As a Data Analyst in the Checkout team, you will be in charge of:


Build the infrastructure required for the extraction, transformation and loading of data from a wide variety of data sources.
Assemble large and complex datasets, with an optimal data pipeline architecture, meeting business requirements.
Implement processes to monitor data quality, ensuring production data is always accurate and available for key stakeholders and business processes that depend on it.
Create alerts and dashboards to contribute to the monitoring and tracking of our business KPIs.
Identify, design and implement internal process improvements: automating manual processes, optimising queries, re-designing infrastructure for greater scalability, etc.
Collaborate with analytics and business teams to improve data models that feed existing reports or create brand new reports with the aim to increase data accessibility and foster data-driven decision making across the organisation.
Contribute to the delivery of strategic projects by participating in the delivery of key initiatives, giving support to the analytics and business teams when it comes to data availability and visualisation to ensure progress and effective delivery of the desired outcomes. Work together with stakeholders in the execution of the projects.



What you need to succeed:

Good to have

Bring your unique perspective, speak up, and offer disruptive solutions. You'll have the opportunity to learn and grow while making a real impact on our team. Here's what you need to succeed:


Bachelor’s degree in a quantitative discipline (Computer Science, Engineering, Mathematics, Statistics, etc.).
Experience building and optimising data pipelines, data sets and workflow management tools (e.g. Dataform).
Advance knowledge of SQL is a requirement as well as experience working with databases and large sets of data; Python programming skills are also required as well as experience in data visualisation or exploration tools such as Looker Studio.
An AI-first mindset — proactively exploring how AI tools can improve efficiency and quality of work.
Advanced Office skills. Strong experience with analytical tools, ideally with Microsoft and Google Office packages (Excel, etc.).
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with high attention to detail.
Strong organisational and communication skills.
Experience supporting and working with cross-functional teams in a dynamic environment.
A self-starter and team player, who also enjoys having fun!
Business Proficiency in English.



Preferred Qualifications


Experience with Applied AI Tools: Demonstrated comfort using practical AI tools such as Gemini, or other AI-powered assistants.
Experimentation Mindset: Curiosity and eagerness to explore, experiment with, and integrate emerging AI-driven solutions into workflows.
AI-Enhanced Problem Solving: Ability to effectively leverage AI tools to streamline processes, and enhance productivity.
Adaptability and Learning Agility: Enthusiastic about continuously learning and quickly adapting to new AI features and capabilities.



What’s in it for you?

The best talent deserves the benefits

At eDO, we want you to be a part of our success story and great culture.

Here's what we offer:


A rewarding Compensation package! 💥 Prime Plus membership, competitive salary and benefits package, including flexible benefits, performance-based bonuses, birthday day off, discounts and partnerships, relocation support and premium equipment with role-based selection options and device ownership through our equipment lifecycle program when it reaches its refresh cycle.
Continuous learning to fuel your growth and explore new horizons! 📚 Learn and grow with free Coursera access, soft skills workshops,tech training, leadership development, and more. Plus, enjoy a great onboarding program.
Grow opportunities to empower your career and unleash your potential! 🚀 Personalised career paths and the eVOLVE Program will help you discover, grow, and thrive. Internal mobility opportunities let you pursue horizontal career changes and promotions.
Your Well-being is our priority. Embrace Freedom and Flexibility! 💙 At eDO, we value flexibility, employee care, and transparency. We offer a hybrid home-office model focused on outcomes. You'll be able to find the right work-personal life balance that suits you best.
Work hard, party hard! We believe in having fun and connecting with colleagues! 🎉 Join eDO for after-work events, padel tournaments, parties, and more. Create communities based on your passions, like sports and music. Come to work as you are, with no dress code, and enjoy free fruit, coffee, and tea at our offices.
Enjoy a dynamic and healthy environment! 💫 Be innovative, take risks, and share your ideas. Our diverse and open-minded teams support high performance, learning, and growth. You'll work in an Agile mindset environment with recognition at our core.



Wanna take a peek into what it's like to work at eDO? Follow us on LinkedIn and discover more about life at eDO!

If you are ready for a career opportunity with unmatched benefits, continuous learning, and a supportive work-life balance, look no further! Take your career to new destinations by applying now and help our diverse, inclusive, and passionate team shape the future of travel.

Apply now!

We are an equal-opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, colour, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status or disability status. Our people are the key to our success. If you’re excited about this role but do not feel your experience aligns perfectly with all the requirements we strongly encourage you to apply nevertheless.

As you contemplate your future, you might be asking yourself, " What's the next step?’’ Start your journey with us!

We're seeking highly skilled technical Data Analysts for the Checkout team who are passionate about data, automation, analysis, and innovation, and who love working in a collaborative and agile environment. If you're ready to soar, we're ready to take you there.

Why eDreams ODIGEO

We’re the world's leading travel subscription platform.

  • We pioneered Prime, the first and world’s leading travel subscription programme since launching in 2017.
  • Millions of Prime members every year across multiple markets.
  • 5 brands: eDreams, GO Voyages, Opodo, Travellink, and the metasearch engine Liligo
  • This entire Prime experience is powered by a proprietary, industry-leading AI platform that delivers a smarter, hyper-personalised service and comprehensive travel experience globally to its members.
  • Diversity is our strength that’s why our eDOers are coming from different nationalities from all continents – 99% permanent contracts


Prime members are subscribed to global travel, gaining access to a comprehensive multi-product offering for all their travel needs—including hotels, rail, flights, dynamic packages and car rental, among others— compounded by industry-leading flexibility features and exclusive, member-only benefits.

What you will do:

The Role's Key Responsibilities and Tasks

As an eDOer, you will have clear objectives, great challenges and a clear overview of how your work contributes to the global company project and its customers. As a Data Analyst in the Checkout team, you will be in charge of:

  • Build the infrastructure required for the extraction, transformation and loading of data from a wide variety of data sources.
  • Assemble large and complex datasets, with an optimal data pipeline architecture, meeting business requirements.
  • Implement processes to monitor data quality, ensuring production data is always accurate and available for key stakeholders and business processes that depend on it.
  • Create alerts and dashboards to contribute to the monitoring and tracking of our business KPIs.
  • Identify, design and implement internal process improvements: automating manual processes, optimising queries, re-designing infrastructure for greater scalability, etc.
  • Collaborate with analytics and business teams to improve data models that feed existing reports or create brand new reports with the aim to increase data accessibility and foster data-driven decision making across the organisation.
  • Contribute to the delivery of strategic projects by participating in the delivery of key initiatives, giving support to the analytics and business teams when it comes to data availability and visualisation to ensure progress and effective delivery of the desired outcomes. Work together with stakeholders in the execution of the projects.


What you need to succeed:

Good to have

Bring your unique perspective, speak up, and offer disruptive solutions. You'll have the opportunity to learn and grow while making a real impact on our team. Here's what you need to succeed:

  • Bachelor’s degree in a quantitative discipline (Computer Science, Engineering, Mathematics, Statistics, etc.).
  • Experience building and optimising data pipelines, data sets and workflow management tools (e.g. Dataform).
  • Advance knowledge of SQL is a requirement as well as experience working with databases and large sets of data; Python programming skills are also required as well as experience in data visualisation or exploration tools such as Looker Studio.
  • An AI-first mindset — proactively exploring how AI tools can improve efficiency and quality of work.
  • Advanced Office skills. Strong experience with analytical tools, ideally with Microsoft and Google Office packages (Excel, etc.).
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with high attention to detail.
  • Strong organisational and communication skills.
  • Experience supporting and working with cross-functional teams in a dynamic environment.
  • A self-starter and team player, who also enjoys having fun!
  • Business Proficiency in English.


Preferred Qualifications

  • Experience with Applied AI Tools: Demonstrated comfort using practical AI tools such as Gemini, or other AI-powered assistants.
  • Experimentation Mindset: Curiosity and eagerness to explore, experiment with, and integrate emerging AI-driven solutions into workflows.
  • AI-Enhanced Problem Solving: Ability to effectively leverage AI tools to streamline processes, and enhance productivity.
  • Adaptability and Learning Agility: Enthusiastic about continuously learning and quickly adapting to new AI features and capabilities.


What’s in it for you?

The best talent deserves the benefits

At eDO, we want you to be a part of our success story and great culture.

Here's what we offer:

  • A rewarding Compensation package! 💥 Prime Plus membership, competitive salary and benefits package, including flexible benefits, performance-based bonuses, birthday day off, discounts and partnerships, relocation support and premium equipment with role-based selection options and device ownership through our equipment lifecycle program when it reaches its refresh cycle.

  • Work hard, party hard! We believe in having fun and connecting with colleagues! 🎉 Join eDO for after-work events, padel tournaments, parties, and more. Create communities based on your passions, like sports and music. Come to work as you are, with no dress code, and enjoy free fruit, coffee, and tea at our offices.
  • Enjoy a dynamic and healthy environment! 💫 Be innovative, take risks, and share your ideas. Our diverse and open-minded teams support high performance, learning, and growth. You'll work in an Agile mindset environment with recognition at our core.

Title: Data Analytics & Insights Analyst
Description:
En Iberostar Group estamos buscando incorporar un/a Data Analytics & Insights Analyst a nuestro equipo de Dato en nuestra sede corporativa de Palma de Mallorca; pero antes de saber más sobre la posición, creemos que es importante que sepas un poco sobre Iberostar Group:




Somos una compañía 100% familiar con 70 años de experiencia en el sector del turismo. Hoy acogemos a millones de viajeros con la promesa de crear vacaciones felices y experiencias memorables, con una propuesta de valor fundamentada en la calidad y en la experiencia del cliente y del empleado.
Operamos en más de 100 establecimientos distribuidos en 35 destinos alrededor de 13 países de todo el mundo ubicados en localizaciones privilegiadas frente al mar.
Formamos parte de una familia de más de 35.000 personas de 95 nacionalidades, compartiendo los mismos valores: Responsabilidad, Transparencia, Humildad, Pasión y Creatividad.
Trabajamos para crear un lugar donde prosperar: cuidamos de las personas que forman parte de la familia Iberostar, impulsando su crecimiento, atendiendo a su bienestar y promoviendo la equidad como base de nuestras decisiones.
Nuestro movimiento Iberostar Wave of Change es nuestra hoja de ruta para impulsar nuestro propósito de liderar un modelo de turismo responsable.




Si esto te resulta interesante... ¡puede que éste sea tu sitio!




Misión




Dar sentido a los datos de múltiples fuentes, traduciéndolos en insights accionables y narrativas visuales (Dashboards) que empoderen a las distintas áreas de negocio para tomar decisiones informadas y basadas en la evidencia.




✔️¿Cuáles serán tus principales funciones?




Diseño de Dashboards y Data Storytelling (Front-End BI): consumir los modelos de datos ya estructurados para diseñar, desarrollar y desplegar paneles visuales atractivos, intuitivos y de alto rendimiento en Microsoft Power BI (uso de DAX avanzado). Garantizar que la interfaz de usuario (UI/UX del dato) facilite una lectura rápida de los KPIs estratégicos.
Gestión y ejecución de proyectos analíticos: liderar el ciclo de vida de los proyectos de reporting asignados. Participar en la toma de requerimientos iniciales con los stakeholders y entrega final del producto conceptual, asegurando el cumplimiento de los plazos definidos en los sprints.
Gestión de demanda y consultoría funcional: actuar como consultor interno para las áreas de negocio. Analizar críticamente sus peticiones para unificar criterios, optimizar la demanda y mitigar la duplicidad innecesaria de informes dentro de la compañía.
Validación funcional y adopción del dato: asegurar que los desarrollos respondan fielmente a las lógicas de negocio solicitadas. Liderar la estrategia de capacitación a los Key Business Users para fomentar la cultura del autoconsumo de información.




🔎 ¿Quién es la persona ideal para este puesto?




Requisitos Esenciales:




Experiencia: entre 2 y 3 años liderando proyectos de Business Intelligence y desarrollando cuadros de mando en entornos corporativos.
Especialización: dominio experto en Microsoft Power BI, con fuerte foco en diseño visual, maquetación, buenas prácticas de visualización y fórmulas DAX.
Gestión de Proyectos: experiencia de trabajo bajo metodologías ágiles (Scrum/Kanban) organizadas por sprints (uso de herramientas como Asana o Azure DevOps).
Formación: Grado Universitario en ADE, Estadística, Matemáticas, Ingeniería IT o disciplinas afines.
Idiomas: Nivel de inglés medio (comprensión técnica).




Requisitos Valorables:




Arquitectura de Datos: entendimiento conceptual de entornos Cloud (Azure Cloud / Databricks) únicamente para comprender la procedencia y la trazabilidad de los datos que consumen los reportes y los agentes.
Interés o conocimientos básicos en lenguajes como Python o R enfocado a la exploración de datos.
Ecosistema GenAI y Agentes: familiaridad conceptual o experiencia práctica en la implementación de Agentes de IA y workflows basados en LLMs.
Herramientas AI Low-Code: conocimientos en plataformas de creación de asistentes y automatización con IA (como Microsoft Copilot Studio, Power Automate AI features o similares).
Prompt Engineering: habilidad en la creación de instrucciones efectivas para optimizar el desarrollo propio (ej. generar DAX) y para guiar al usuario final en el uso de herramientas conversacionales de datos.




Competencias Conductuales:




Capacidad de síntesis: habilidad para traducir necesidades de negocio complejas en soluciones visuales sencillas y accionables.
Comunicación asertiva: capacidad de interlocución con directores y mandos intermedios de distintas áreas de la empresa.
Rigor y organización: fuerte compromiso con los entregables de cada sprint y atención al detalle en la calidad estética y funcional de los paneles.




Stack Tecnológico:




Herramienta Principal: Microsoft Power BI (Service, Desktop).
Gestión de Proyectos: Asana / Smartsheet / Azure DevOps.
Entorno de Datos (OPCIONAL): Azure Cloud (DataLake, Synapse, Data Factory), Databricks.




⭐¿Qué beneficios tendrás?




Smart Working: Flexibilidad horaria y posibilidad de teletrabajo en función de la organización del Departamento.
Formación continua a través de planes formativos y de Iberostar Campus, nuestra plataforma de aprendizaje donde te podrás nutrir de formaciones específicas y globales.
Un paquete de atractivos beneficios como: Afterworks, descuentos en todos nuestros hoteles y en otros servicios y productos como seguro de salud, viajes, ocio y mucho más.
Ser miembro de la Comunidad Iberostar Vitality (nuestro programa de empresa saludable y de bienestar para el empleado).
Trabajar en un entorno inspirador que apuesta por las personas, los valores y un modelo de turismo responsable.




¿Te suena retador? Inscríbete y estaremos encantados de ampliarte más información. Súmate al equipo #WEAREIBEROSTAR

Title: Data Analyst II - Treasury
Description:
Ebury helps ambitious businesses unlock global growth, and we take the same approach with our people. We encourage innovation and movement, collaboration and problem-solving, and foster an environment where everyone can feel they belong, are valued, supported and empowered to succeed.

If you’re a collaborator who wants to help transform how businesses operate globally, get in touch - we’d love to discuss how Ebury can accelerate your career so you can shape the future.

Data Analyst - Treasury

Location: Málaga or Madrid (Spain) - Hybrid: 4 days in the office, 1 day working from home per week

Ebury’s strategic growth plan would not be possible without our Data Analytics & Reporting team and we are seeking a Data Analyst to join our Treasury domain!

Our data mission is to develop and maintain Ebury’s Data Platform and serve it to the whole company. This platform is the backbone of Ebury: it supports internal decision making, allows us to monitor our Treasury positions and risks, comply with regulatory reporting obligations and enables commercial opportunities globally.

The Data team works closely with Treasury, Product and Tech teams to coordinate and implement data analysis initiatives helping the Cash management, ALM and Treasury Reporting teams. Some of the projects we are currently working on include: MtM valuations reconciliation with our Treasury reporting system to ensure completeness and accuracy in our Financial statements, cash operational charges data analysis to reduce Treasury costs, liquidity data analysis to help ALM team manage daily liquidity obligations, and building AI agentic workflows to automate routine data operations and decision support, and many many more!

As part of the team you will


Work closely with the rest of the Data Analysts, Analytics Engineers, Data Engineering, Treasury and Product teams
Be responsible for modelling data in our collaborative data platform to perform critical Treasury data analysis and build reports and reconciliations for the Treasury domain
Manage end-to-end treasury solutions across all jurisdictions of the company from requirements gathering, building optimised data models and delivering the reports to our treasury stakeholders and auditors
Maintain and build dashboards and visualisations on the data platform using our BI tools for Treasury teams to monitor reporting and controls


What we’re looking for


2+ years of experience in Data/Business Analytics - applied to Treasury or Finance is a plus!
Advanced SQL skills - must be able to read and write complex SQL queries
Experience with our modern data stack tools (a plus!) We use dbt, Google Cloud Platform (BigQuery, DataStudio), Sigma
Strong problem solving and analytical skills with excellent attention to detail
The ability to manage, organise and present data in a clear, concise and actionable format
Experience working with Python is a plus
Comfortable working in a fast-paced and demanding work environment
Track record of working autonomously with time management skills
Fluency in English
Financial Services and Capital Markets Experience (FX, Payments, Money Markets, Treasury Management, etc) is a good plus!


What Ebury offers you


Competitive salary conditions
Private health insurance, gympass and access to Meditopia
Support to progress your career in the Data & Analytics world
Work in a collaborative environment and contribute to a new data infrastructure built on a modern data stack
Flexible workplace environment
23 days of annual leave plus your birthday off
Fun in-person off-sites and virtual get-togethers
Personal development including language courses


About Us

Ebury delivers sophisticated, integrated solutions — business accounts, hedging, and financing — on a single platform with a seamless workflow. Our success is built on a simple premise and singular purpose: To help businesses operate and scale globally.

Since its founding in 2009, Ebury has always been a fast-growing leader in fintech. Today, we bring together 1,800+ Eburians across nearly 70 cities and we’re always looking to add to our team.

At the heart of our offering is a proprietary platform, purpose-built to help businesses seamlessly streamline and manage global cash flow. We focus on continuous product evolution and innovation to build the infrastructure for borderless growth and help our clients scale at every stage.

The opportunities at Ebury are as diverse as our people, ranging from business development to engineering roles across our tech pillars.

We believe in inclusion. We stand against discrimination in all forms and are against the intolerance of differences that makes us a modern and successful organisation. At Ebury, you can be whoever you want to be and still feel a sense of belonging no matter your story.

Title: Business Intelligence Analyst (Junior/Mid)
Place: Las Palmas de Gran Canaria, Canary Islands, Spain
Description:
En Domingo Alonso Group buscamos incorporar un/a Business Intelligence Analyst. Buscamos a alguien apasionado por el análisis de datos y la estrategia, pero sobre todo, con un fuerte espíritu crítico. Queremos sumar al equipo a una persona analítica e inconformista, con la iniciativa necesaria para profundizar en el origen de cada situación y cuestionar los datos para aportar valor real.




En este rol, serás clave para el desarrollo y mantenimiento de soluciones de datos integrales, abarcando desde la creación de informes y cuadros de mando hasta la participación en iniciativas impulsadas por Inteligencia Artificial. Apoyándote en tus habilidades con SQL y trabajando directamente con Databricks y Power BI, trabajarás codo con codo tanto con las distintas unidades de negocio como con otros profesionales del área, traduciendo sus necesidades en insights claros y directamente accionables. Todo ello en un entorno tecnológico de vanguardia donde apostamos por infraestructuras punteras como Azure Cloud y Databricks.




¿Quién NOS ENCAJA en este puesto?




Una persona analítica con capacidad para interpretar datos, además de buena comunicación y orientación al cliente. También, a nivel técnico, es importante que tenga experiencia co herramientas de Reporting/Business Intelligence (como, por ejemplo, PowerBI), conocimiento de SQL y Python.




¿Cuáles serían tus RESPONSABILIDADES?




Interlocución con el negocio: Hablar con las diferentes unidades de la empresa para entender profundamente sus problemas y traducirlos en soluciones de datos efectivas.
Diseño de dashboards e informes: Crear y mantener cuadros de mando interactivos que simplifiquen el acceso a la información.
Automatización de reportes: Optimizar los flujos de información actuales para eliminar tareas manuales y garantizar reportes siempre actualizados.
Extracción y transformación de datos: Recopilar, limpiar y modelar datos para asegurar su calidad y consistencia.
Gobernanza del dato: Asegurar la precisión de la información y documentar los procesos para mantener una "única fuente de verdad" en la compañía.
Colaborar en la creación y mantenimiento de documentación técnica y funcional.




¿Qué te OFRECEMOS?




Ambiente de trabajo colaborativo.
Beneficios adicionales.
Trabajar en un entorno tecnológico e innovador donde poder aportar todas las ideas y mejoras que se te ocurran.
Posibilidad de desarrollo profesional.
Formación continua.
Jornada completa (40 hrs/semana).
Horario: 08:00 a 16:00h




Si te apasiona el mundo de los datos y estás buscando una oportunidad para crecer en un entorno desafiante, ¡esperamos tu aplicación!




REQUISITOS MÍNIMOS:




Título universitario o a punto de concluir en Ingeniería Informática, Ciencia de Datos o campo relacionado.
Conocimientos sólidos en SQL para la manipulación de datos.
Conocimientos sólidos en herramientas de visualización de datos como Power BI o similares.
Conocimientos de estadística y análisis de datos.
Comprensión básica de los principios de modelado de datos.
Habilidad para trabajar en equipo y comunicarse eficazmente.
Deseo de aprender y crecer en un entorno dinámico.
Aunque no son requisitos para el puesto, también valoramos:
Lenguajes de programación: Conocimientos básicos o intermedios de Python o R para análisis estadístico avanzado o automatización de tareas.
Entornos Cloud: Experiencia previa trabajando con plataformas en la nube como Databricks, AWS o Azure.
Certificaciones oficiales: Contar con certificaciones en herramientas clave (ej. PL-300 de Power BI)
Analítica predictiva: Nociones o interés en modelos de Machine Learning y estadística aplicada al negocio. Conocimientos en herramientas de CI/CD y repositorio de versiones.

Title: Revenue Analyst
Place: Las Palmas de Gran Canaria, Canary Islands, Spain
Description:
¿Quiénes somos? 🌊⚓

Baleària es una empresa líder en el sector naviero, formada por más de 3.000 personas, y comprometida con la innovación y el desarrollo sostenible.

Nuestro éxito se basa en la pasión y dedicación de nuestros equipos, con quienes mantenemos un firme compromiso con su crecimiento y bienestar, creando un entorno de trabajo de primer nivel.

Todo ello nos ha permitido obtener la certificación Top Employer 2026, revalidando este sello por tercer año consecutivo.

#WeAreBalearia #TopEmployer

🔎¡Abrimos vacante estable como Revenue Analyst para nuestro centro de trabajo en Las Palmas y queremos que tú seas parte de nuestro equipo!

Si te apasiona el análisis de datos, la optimización de ingresos y el sector turístico, esta puede ser una gran oportunidad para desarrollar tu carrera profesional en una de las compañías más innovadoras del sector marítimo.

¿Cómo será tu día a día?

La Persona Seleccionada Se Responsabilizará De Las Siguientes Funciones


Realizar el seguimiento y análisis de los precios medios por línea, acomodación, tipo de vehículo y temporada.
Monitorizar los precios y estrategias comerciales de otras compañías del sector transporte para identificar oportunidades y mantener una posición competitiva.
Gestionar la apertura, limitación y seguimiento de plazas promocionales y descuentos en función de la demanda y los objetivos comerciales.
Analizar la ocupación de las diferentes acomodaciones y apoyar la planificación de la oferta disponible.
Elaborar informes, análisis y reporting que permitan realizar un seguimiento eficiente de los principales indicadores de negocio (KPIs).
Analizar la venta de productos complementarios y proponer acciones orientadas a incrementar el ingreso medio por pasajero.


¿Qué te ofrecemos?

En Baleària valoramos y cuidamos a nuestro equipo. Esto es lo que te espera al unirte a nosotros:


💶 Condiciones económicas: Remuneración acorde a tus expectativas y experiencia profesional
📚 Formación continua, a través de nuestra Escuela de Empresa Baleària (EdEB), con foco en liderazgo, seguridad, operaciones y desarrollo profesional.
💼 Retribución flexible, con beneficios sociales (salud, comida, transporte, guardería, etc.) y ahorro fiscal
🤝 Ambiente de trabajo colaborativo, donde tus ideas y aportaciones cuentan
🎟️ Otros beneficios sociales (plataformas de descuentos, billetes de empleado, etc.)
🚢 Empresa líder en el sector, con cultura y valores consolidados
🏅 Empresa Top Employer, reflejo de nuestro compromiso con un entorno laboral excelente


Requisitos


Residencia en la zona del centro de trabajo o disponibilidad para trabajar de forma presencial.
Formación universitaria en ADE, Economía, Turismo, Estadística, Matemáticas o titulaciones afines.
Experiencia previa de entre 2 y 3 años en posiciones de Revenue Management, Pricing, Business Analytics o similares, preferiblemente en empresas del sector turístico o transporte.
Capacidad analítica y orientación a la toma de decisiones basada en datos
Nivel avanzado de Excel y facilidad para trabajar con grandes volúmenes de datos.

Title: Revenue Data Analyst
Place: Las Palmas de Gran Canaria, Canary Islands, Spain
Description:
Sobre RIU Hotels & Resorts




Con más de 100 hoteles en 23 países y 70 años de excelencia en el sector hotelero, RIU Hotels & Resorts es un líder mundial reconocido por su servicio excepcional, innovación y hospitalidad.

Únete a nosotros mientras seguimos redefiniendo el lujo y la excelencia. Ya sea desarrollando tu carrera profesional, explorando nuevos horizontes o trabajando con un equipo dinámico e inclusivo, RIU Hotels & Resorts te ofrece oportunidades inigualables para continuar creciendo.




Ejecutivo/a de Revenue




Descripción del empleo




¿Te interesaría participar en un plan de carrera internacional con nosotros?




Esta posición ayudarás al departamento de Revenue mediante la creación y análisis de documentos que ayuden a automatizar procesos y agilicen la toma de decisiones.




Principales funciones a realizar:




En colaboración con los equipos de Inventario y Pricing crear dashboards e informes automatizados de revenue en herramientas como Microstrategy y Excel.
Monitorear y analizar indicadores clave de desempeño como tasa de ocupación, pickup y pace. Proponer y ejecutar acciones sobre de venta de acuerdo a los indicadores analizados.
En coordinación con otros departamentos implementar estrategias de precios dinámicos basadas en demanda, datos históricos y competencia.
Forecasting: Análisis de datos históricos y tendencias para proyectar ventas.
Análisis de resultados (recomendaciones acciones correctivas si aplican).
Tareas variadas: Control competencia (precios/ocupaciones) manejos MLOS, control cupos y dimensionar ventas por mercado/canal.




Aptitudes deseadas:




Manejo del excel nivel avanzado, con conocimientos de programación dentro de los documentos (se valorará manejo de otras herramientas como Phyton, Power Query y plataformas de IA).
Conectividad: Se valorará la capacidad de integrar y extraer datos directamente desde sistemas PMS, RMS o Channel Managers.
Manejo herramientas de Diseño: Manejo avanzado de Canva (uso de plantillas de marca, componentes dinámicos, gráficos visuales y formatos de presentación ejecutiva).
Inglés fluido (hablado y escrito).
Habilidades organizativas y atención al detalle tanto en la precisión del dato como en la estética visual de las entregas.
Comunicación oral y escrita.
Gestión del tiempo y de proyectos.
Buenas habilidades numéricas y capacidad analítica.
Capacidad para trabajar en equipo.




Qué ofrecemos




Programa de Excelencia: Incorporación al programa de desarrollo de talento internacional de RIU Hotels & Resorts.
Especialización: Formación 360° de alto valor enfocada de forma inmersiva en el área de Marketing & Ventas.
Liderazgo: Mentoría directa por parte de los líderes de cada departamento en hoteles de la línea Riu Plaza.
Movilidad: Facilidades de traslado y alojamiento (según las políticas de movilidad del programa).
Proyección: Plan de carrera real para asumir puestos de responsabilidad al finalizar la formación.

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
About BizAway

Here at BizAway, we Deliver the Future of Travel. 😎

We are a solid international company with strong ambitions and great expertise. With a focus on sustainability 🌱, on a daily basis we support companies enabling them to improve their travel management through our constantly evolving services and solutions, always characterized by our tech attitude and smart and innovative processes. 🚀

We know that success comes from People and deserves to be recognized.👫Proactivity and

Reliability, Kind collaboration, and communication are the core values of our Solution Culture.

If you like challenges and would love to be part of one of the fastest-growing B2B scale-ups, then BizAway is the company you have been looking for. 🤩

We are looking for

We are looking for a driven and enthusiastic Data Analyst (m/w/d) , who desires to contribute to the growth and success of our Data & Analytics Team.

Your role in BizAway


You manage and improve our current reporting system, supporting all internal needs for Data visualization of data findings through charts, graphs, and dashboards to make our data understandable.
You learn all aspects of the travel industry from Finance, Products, Sales and Service/Operations perspective, translating data into actionable insights resulting in verifiable reporting.
By having domain expertise in our industry, you engage with Business and Strategy stakeholders to help define KPIs, including how data will be captured, shared, and leveraged across our departments.
You contribute to creating the base foundations of a comprehensive source of truth through data modeling actions


Your Basic Qualifications


Previously worked in a Tech Company
Demonstrated experience with Product Analytics tools (eg: Amplitude, Mixpanel, Pendo, Google Analytics)
Demonstrated experience with BI Data Visualization tools (Qlik preferred)
Data analysis, presentation, and visualization experience
Strong communication skills required
Ability to work alone or in a team as required
Bachelor's degree in Statistics, Engineering, Economics or a related field is preferred
English proficiency (written and spoken level B2)


We are also interested in


Knowledge of programming languages such as Python
Experience with ETL tools
Understanding of AI/ML concepts


Our offer

📄 Contract type: Permanent

🕓 Working hours: Full-time – 40h/week, from Monday to Friday

🏢 Hybrid setting, flexible working policy, and great offices in Europe

💰 Salary: Attractive compensation, including equity in the company

💼 Equity in the company (stock options plan)

✈️ A seat on a scale-up with skyrocketing growth

📈 Development of your entrepreneurial spirit, having the chance to implement real-impact business decision

🌍Multicultural and international team

🙌Collaborative and smart environment to work and learn

🍻Free coffee to kick-start your day and free beers to celebrate together

BizAway avoids any discrimination based on age, gender, sexual orientation, health status, nationality, political opinions, and religious beliefs in all decisions affecting personnel selection.

Title: Analista de datos
Description:
¡En Neural buscamos un/a Analista de Datos! 🌟




¿Quiénes somos? 🏢




Nuestra misión es clara: mejorar la calidad de vida de las personas a través de la neurorrehabilitación, el acompañamiento en salud mental y la atención a la infancia con trastornos del neurodesarrollo.

¿Qué buscamos? 🔍

Para seguir creciendo, necesitamos incorporar a una persona que comparta nuestra visión, buscamos un Analista de Datos que transforme datos operativos y de negocio en información accionable. Trabajará junto a equipos de tecnología y negocio para diseñar métricas, construir cuadros de mando y dar soporte a la toma de decisiones.




¿Cuáles serán tus funciones? 📝




Recopilar, depurar y modelar datos procedentes de múltiples fuentes y plataformas.
Diseñar y mantener cuadros de mando e informes (Power BI / equivalente) para las unidades de negocio.
Analizar tendencias, incidencias y patrones de uso para anticipar problemas de forma proactiva.
Definir y calcular KPIs de servicio (SLA, capacidad, utilización) y de negocio.
Automatizar consultas y procesos repetitivos de reporting mediante SQL y scripting.
Documentar especificaciones de datos y garantizar la calidad e integridad de la información.
Colaborar con Business Analysts, arquitectos y equipos de proyecto para alinear objetivos y entregables.




¿Qué ofrecemos? 📃

Title: Checkout Data Analyst - (Hybrid)
Description:
As you contemplate your future, you might be asking yourself, " What's the next step?’’ Start your journey with us!

We're seeking highly skilled technical Data Analysts for the Checkout team who are passionate about data, automation, analysis, and innovation, and who love working in a collaborative and agile environment. If you're ready to soar, we're ready to take you there.

Why eDreams ODIGEO

We’re the world's leading travel subscription platform.


We pioneered Prime, the first and world’s leading travel subscription programme since launching in 2017.
Millions of Prime members every year across multiple markets.
5 brands: eDreams, GO Voyages, Opodo, Travellink, and the metasearch engine Liligo
This entire Prime experience is powered by a proprietary, industry-leading AI platform that delivers a smarter, hyper-personalised service and comprehensive travel experience globally to its members.
Diversity is our strength that’s why our eDOers are coming from different nationalities from all continents – 99% permanent contracts



Prime members are subscribed to global travel, gaining access to a comprehensive multi-product offering for all their travel needs—including hotels, rail, flights, dynamic packages and car rental, among others— compounded by industry-leading flexibility features and exclusive, member-only benefits.

What you will do:

The Role's Key Responsibilities and Tasks

As an eDOer, you will have clear objectives, great challenges and a clear overview of how your work contributes to the global company project and its customers. As a Data Analyst in the Checkout team, you will be in charge of:


Build the infrastructure required for the extraction, transformation and loading of data from a wide variety of data sources.
Assemble large and complex datasets, with an optimal data pipeline architecture, meeting business requirements.
Implement processes to monitor data quality, ensuring production data is always accurate and available for key stakeholders and business processes that depend on it.
Create alerts and dashboards to contribute to the monitoring and tracking of our business KPIs.
Identify, design and implement internal process improvements: automating manual processes, optimising queries, re-designing infrastructure for greater scalability, etc.
Collaborate with analytics and business teams to improve data models that feed existing reports or create brand new reports with the aim to increase data accessibility and foster data-driven decision making across the organisation.
Contribute to the delivery of strategic projects by participating in the delivery of key initiatives, giving support to the analytics and business teams when it comes to data availability and visualisation to ensure progress and effective delivery of the desired outcomes. Work together with stakeholders in the execution of the projects.



What you need to succeed:

Good to have

Bring your unique perspective, speak up, and offer disruptive solutions. You'll have the opportunity to learn and grow while making a real impact on our team. Here's what you need to succeed:


Bachelor’s degree in a quantitative discipline (Computer Science, Engineering, Mathematics, Statistics, etc.).
Experience building and optimising data pipelines, data sets and workflow management tools (e.g. Dataform).
Advance knowledge of SQL is a requirement as well as experience working with databases and large sets of data; Python programming skills are also required as well as experience in data visualisation or exploration tools such as Looker Studio.
An AI-first mindset — proactively exploring how AI tools can improve efficiency and quality of work.
Advanced Office skills. Strong experience with analytical tools, ideally with Microsoft and Google Office packages (Excel, etc.).
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with high attention to detail.
Strong organisational and communication skills.
Experience supporting and working with cross-functional teams in a dynamic environment.
A self-starter and team player, who also enjoys having fun!
Business Proficiency in English.



Preferred Qualifications


Experience with Applied AI Tools: Demonstrated comfort using practical AI tools such as Gemini, or other AI-powered assistants.
Experimentation Mindset: Curiosity and eagerness to explore, experiment with, and integrate emerging AI-driven solutions into workflows.
AI-Enhanced Problem Solving: Ability to effectively leverage AI tools to streamline processes, and enhance productivity.
Adaptability and Learning Agility: Enthusiastic about continuously learning and quickly adapting to new AI features and capabilities.



What’s in it for you?

The best talent deserves the benefits

At eDO, we want you to be a part of our success story and great culture.

Here's what we offer:


A rewarding Compensation package! 💥 Prime Plus membership, competitive salary and benefits package, including flexible benefits, performance-based bonuses, birthday day off, discounts and partnerships, relocation support and premium equipment with role-based selection options and device ownership through our equipment lifecycle program when it reaches its refresh cycle.
Continuous learning to fuel your growth and explore new horizons! 📚 Learn and grow with free Coursera access, soft skills workshops,tech training, leadership development, and more. Plus, enjoy a great onboarding program.
Grow opportunities to empower your career and unleash your potential! 🚀 Personalised career paths and the eVOLVE Program will help you discover, grow, and thrive. Internal mobility opportunities let you pursue horizontal career changes and promotions.
Your Well-being is our priority. Embrace Freedom and Flexibility! 💙 At eDO, we value flexibility, employee care, and transparency. We offer a hybrid home-office model focused on outcomes. You'll be able to find the right work-personal life balance that suits you best.
Work hard, party hard! We believe in having fun and connecting with colleagues! 🎉 Join eDO for after-work events, padel tournaments, parties, and more. Create communities based on your passions, like sports and music. Come to work as you are, with no dress code, and enjoy free fruit, coffee, and tea at our offices.
Enjoy a dynamic and healthy environment! 💫 Be innovative, take risks, and share your ideas. Our diverse and open-minded teams support high performance, learning, and growth. You'll work in an Agile mindset environment with recognition at our core.



Wanna take a peek into what it's like to work at eDO? Follow us on LinkedIn and discover more about life at eDO!

If you are ready for a career opportunity with unmatched benefits, continuous learning, and a supportive work-life balance, look no further! Take your career to new destinations by applying now and help our diverse, inclusive, and passionate team shape the future of travel.

Apply now!

We are an equal-opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, colour, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status or disability status. Our people are the key to our success. Each one of them is unique in their own way and the respect for their uniqueness is and will always be a passion and motivation. Don’t meet every requirement? If you’re excited about this role but do not feel your experience aligns perfectly with all the requirements we strongly encourage you to apply nevertheless.

Title: Data Analytics & Insights Analyst
Description:
En Iberostar Group estamos buscando incorporar un/a Data Analytics & Insights Analyst a nuestro equipo de Dato en nuestra sede corporativa de Palma de Mallorca; pero antes de saber más sobre la posición, creemos que es importante que sepas un poco sobre Iberostar Group:




Somos una compañía 100% familiar con 70 años de experiencia en el sector del turismo. Hoy acogemos a millones de viajeros con la promesa de crear vacaciones felices y experiencias memorables, con una propuesta de valor fundamentada en la calidad y en la experiencia del cliente y del empleado.
Operamos en más de 100 establecimientos distribuidos en 35 destinos alrededor de 13 países de todo el mundo ubicados en localizaciones privilegiadas frente al mar.
Formamos parte de una familia de más de 35.000 personas de 95 nacionalidades, compartiendo los mismos valores: Responsabilidad, Transparencia, Humildad, Pasión y Creatividad.
Trabajamos para crear un lugar donde prosperar: cuidamos de las personas que forman parte de la familia Iberostar, impulsando su crecimiento, atendiendo a su bienestar y promoviendo la equidad como base de nuestras decisiones.
Nuestro movimiento Iberostar Wave of Change es nuestra hoja de ruta para impulsar nuestro propósito de liderar un modelo de turismo responsable.




Si esto te resulta interesante... ¡puede que éste sea tu sitio!




Misión




Dar sentido a los datos de múltiples fuentes, traduciéndolos en insights accionables y narrativas visuales (Dashboards) que empoderen a las distintas áreas de negocio para tomar decisiones informadas y basadas en la evidencia.




✔️¿Cuáles serán tus principales funciones?




Diseño de Dashboards y Data Storytelling (Front-End BI): consumir los modelos de datos ya estructurados para diseñar, desarrollar y desplegar paneles visuales atractivos, intuitivos y de alto rendimiento en Microsoft Power BI (uso de DAX avanzado). Garantizar que la interfaz de usuario (UI/UX del dato) facilite una lectura rápida de los KPIs estratégicos.
Gestión y ejecución de proyectos analíticos: liderar el ciclo de vida de los proyectos de reporting asignados. Participar en la toma de requerimientos iniciales con los stakeholders y entrega final del producto conceptual, asegurando el cumplimiento de los plazos definidos en los sprints.
Gestión de demanda y consultoría funcional: actuar como consultor interno para las áreas de negocio. Analizar críticamente sus peticiones para unificar criterios, optimizar la demanda y mitigar la duplicidad innecesaria de informes dentro de la compañía.
Validación funcional y adopción del dato: asegurar que los desarrollos respondan fielmente a las lógicas de negocio solicitadas. Liderar la estrategia de capacitación a los Key Business Users para fomentar la cultura del autoconsumo de información.




🔎 ¿Quién es la persona ideal para este puesto?




Requisitos Esenciales:




Experiencia: entre 2 y 3 años liderando proyectos de Business Intelligence y desarrollando cuadros de mando en entornos corporativos.
Especialización: dominio experto en Microsoft Power BI, con fuerte foco en diseño visual, maquetación, buenas prácticas de visualización y fórmulas DAX.
Gestión de Proyectos: experiencia de trabajo bajo metodologías ágiles (Scrum/Kanban) organizadas por sprints (uso de herramientas como Asana o Azure DevOps).
Formación: Grado Universitario en ADE, Estadística, Matemáticas, Ingeniería IT o disciplinas afines.
Idiomas: Nivel de inglés medio (comprensión técnica).




Requisitos Valorables:




Arquitectura de Datos: entendimiento conceptual de entornos Cloud (Azure Cloud / Databricks) únicamente para comprender la procedencia y la trazabilidad de los datos que consumen los reportes y los agentes.
Interés o conocimientos básicos en lenguajes como Python o R enfocado a la exploración de datos.
Ecosistema GenAI y Agentes: familiaridad conceptual o experiencia práctica en la implementación de Agentes de IA y workflows basados en LLMs.
Herramientas AI Low-Code: conocimientos en plataformas de creación de asistentes y automatización con IA (como Microsoft Copilot Studio, Power Automate AI features o similares).
Prompt Engineering: habilidad en la creación de instrucciones efectivas para optimizar el desarrollo propio (ej. generar DAX) y para guiar al usuario final en el uso de herramientas conversacionales de datos.




Competencias Conductuales:




Capacidad de síntesis: habilidad para traducir necesidades de negocio complejas en soluciones visuales sencillas y accionables.
Comunicación asertiva: capacidad de interlocución con directores y mandos intermedios de distintas áreas de la empresa.
Rigor y organización: fuerte compromiso con los entregables de cada sprint y atención al detalle en la calidad estética y funcional de los paneles.




Stack Tecnológico:




Herramienta Principal: Microsoft Power BI (Service, Desktop).
Gestión de Proyectos: Asana / Smartsheet / Azure DevOps.
Entorno de Datos (OPCIONAL): Azure Cloud (DataLake, Synapse, Data Factory), Databricks.




⭐¿Qué beneficios tendrás?




Smart Working: Flexibilidad horaria y posibilidad de teletrabajo en función de la organización del Departamento.
Formación continua a través de planes formativos y de Iberostar Campus, nuestra plataforma de aprendizaje donde te podrás nutrir de formaciones específicas y globales.
Un paquete de atractivos beneficios como: Afterworks, descuentos en todos nuestros hoteles y en otros servicios y productos como seguro de salud, viajes, ocio y mucho más.
Ser miembro de la Comunidad Iberostar Vitality (nuestro programa de empresa saludable y de bienestar para el empleado).
Trabajar en un entorno inspirador que apuesta por las personas, los valores y un modelo de turismo responsable.




¿Te suena retador? Inscríbete y estaremos encantados de ampliarte más información. Súmate al equipo #WEAREIBEROSTAR

En Iberostar Group estamos buscando incorporar un/a Data Analytics & Insights Analyst a nuestro equipo de Dato en nuestra sede corporativa de Palma de Mallorca; pero antes de saber más sobre la posición, creemos que es importante que sepas un poco sobre Iberostar Group:


  • Somos una compañía 100% familiar con 70 años de experiencia en el sector del turismo. Hoy acogemos a millones de viajeros con la promesa de crear vacaciones felices y experiencias memorables, con una propuesta de valor fundamentada en la calidad y en la experiencia del cliente y del empleado.
  • Operamos en más de 100 establecimientos distribuidos en 35 destinos alrededor de 13 países de todo el mundo ubicados en localizaciones privilegiadas frente al mar.
  • Formamos parte de una familia de más de 35.000 personas de 95 nacionalidades, compartiendo los mismos valores: Responsabilidad, Transparencia, Humildad, Pasión y Creatividad.
  • Trabajamos para crear un lugar donde prosperar: cuidamos de las personas que forman parte de la familia Iberostar, impulsando su crecimiento, atendiendo a su bienestar y promoviendo la equidad como base de nuestras decisiones.
  • Nuestro movimiento Iberostar Wave of Change es nuestra hoja de ruta para impulsar nuestro propósito de liderar un modelo de turismo responsable.


Si esto te resulta interesante... ¡puede que éste sea tu sitio!


Misión


Dar sentido a los datos de múltiples fuentes, traduciéndolos en insights accionables y narrativas visuales (Dashboards) que empoderen a las distintas áreas de negocio para tomar decisiones informadas y basadas en la evidencia.


✔️¿Cuáles serán tus principales funciones?


  • Diseño de Dashboards y Data Storytelling (Front-End BI): consumir los modelos de datos ya estructurados para diseñar, desarrollar y desplegar paneles visuales atractivos, intuitivos y de alto rendimiento en Microsoft Power BI (uso de DAX avanzado). Garantizar que la interfaz de usuario (UI/UX del dato) facilite una lectura rápida de los KPIs estratégicos.
  • Gestión y ejecución de proyectos analíticos: liderar el ciclo de vida de los proyectos de reporting asignados. Participar en la toma de requerimientos iniciales con los stakeholders y entrega final del producto conceptual, asegurando el cumplimiento de los plazos definidos en los sprints.
  • Gestión de demanda y consultoría funcional: actuar como consultor interno para las áreas de negocio. Analizar críticamente sus peticiones para unificar criterios, optimizar la demanda y mitigar la duplicidad innecesaria de informes dentro de la compañía.
  • Validación funcional y adopción del dato: asegurar que los desarrollos respondan fielmente a las lógicas de negocio solicitadas. Liderar la estrategia de capacitación a los Key Business Users para fomentar la cultura del autoconsumo de información.


🔎 ¿Quién es la persona ideal para este puesto?


Requisitos Esenciales:


  • Experiencia: entre 2 y 3 años liderando proyectos de Business Intelligence y desarrollando cuadros de mando en entornos corporativos.
  • Especialización: dominio experto en Microsoft Power BI, con fuerte foco en diseño visual, maquetación, buenas prácticas de visualización y fórmulas DAX.
  • Gestión de Proyectos: experiencia de trabajo bajo metodologías ágiles (Scrum/Kanban) organizadas por sprints (uso de herramientas como Asana o Azure DevOps).
  • Formación: Grado Universitario en ADE, Estadística, Matemáticas, Ingeniería IT o disciplinas afines.
  • Idiomas: Nivel de inglés medio (comprensión técnica).


Requisitos Valorables:


  • Arquitectura de Datos: entendimiento conceptual de entornos Cloud (Azure Cloud / Databricks) únicamente para comprender la procedencia y la trazabilidad de los datos que consumen los reportes y los agentes.
  • Interés o conocimientos básicos en lenguajes como Python o R enfocado a la exploración de datos.
  • Ecosistema GenAI y Agentes: familiaridad conceptual o experiencia práctica en la implementación de Agentes de IA y workflows basados en LLMs.
  • Herramientas AI Low-Code: conocimientos en plataformas de creación de asistentes y automatización con IA (como Microsoft Copilot Studio, Power Automate AI features o similares).
  • Prompt Engineering: habilidad en la creación de instrucciones efectivas para optimizar el desarrollo propio (ej. generar DAX) y para guiar al usuario final en el uso de herramientas conversacionales de datos.


Competencias Conductuales:


  • Capacidad de síntesis: habilidad para traducir necesidades de negocio complejas en soluciones visuales sencillas y accionables.
  • Comunicación asertiva: capacidad de interlocución con directores y mandos intermedios de distintas áreas de la empresa.
  • Rigor y organización: fuerte compromiso con los entregables de cada sprint y atención al detalle en la calidad estética y funcional de los paneles.


Stack Tecnológico:


  • Herramienta Principal: Microsoft Power BI (Service, Desktop).
  • Gestión de Proyectos: Asana / Smartsheet / Azure DevOps.
  • Entorno de Datos (OPCIONAL): Azure Cloud (DataLake, Synapse, Data Factory), Databricks.


⭐¿Qué beneficios tendrás?


  • Smart Working: Flexibilidad horaria y posibilidad de teletrabajo en función de la organización del Departamento.
  • Formación continua a través de planes formativos y de Iberostar Campus, nuestra plataforma de aprendizaje donde te podrás nutrir de formaciones específicas y globales.
  • Un paquete de atractivos beneficios como: Afterworks, descuentos en todos nuestros hoteles y en otros servicios y productos como seguro de salud, viajes, ocio y mucho más.
  • Ser miembro de la Comunidad Iberostar Vitality (nuestro programa de empresa saludable y de bienestar para el empleado).
  • Trabajar en un entorno inspirador que apuesta por las personas, los valores y un modelo de turismo responsable.


¿Te suena retador? Inscríbete y estaremos encantados de ampliarte más información. Súmate al equipo #WEAREIBEROSTAR

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
Company Description

Inetum is a European leader in digital services. Inetum’s team of 28,000 consultants and specialists strive every day to make a digital impact for businesses, public sector entities and society. Inetum’s solutions aim at contributing to its clients’ performance and innovation as well as the common good. Present in 19 countries with a dense network of sites, Inetum partners with major software publishers to meet the challenges of digital transformation with proximity and flexibility. Driven by its ambition for growth and scale, Inetum generated sales of 2.5 billion euros in 2023.

Job Description

Job Description:

The Data Analyst is responsible for collecting, cleaning, analyzing, and interpreting data to provide actionable insights for business decisions. The role involves creating and managing data pipelines using Airflow for data extraction, processing, and loading, ensuring their maintenance, monitoring, and stability. The analyst will work closely with end-users and other teams to provide accessible and reliable data

Main Tasks


Responsible for creating data pipelines in Airflow for data extracting, processing and loading
Responsible for code and query optimization
Responsible for generating insights and identify trends, anomalies or opportunities to improve users experience and anticipate their daily tasks
Responsible for delivering data in useful and appealing ways to users
Responsible for understanding business change and requirement needs, assess the impact and the cost.


Qualifications

Technical Skills:


Python
Experience in creating APIs in Python
PySpark
SQL, Oracle Data Base
Experience with Data Warehouses
Apache Airflow - Experience in pipeline development
Git
Agile methodologies


Language Skills


English – Practice


Soft Skills


Good communication skills
Strong analytical abilities, able to have the right synthesis and all possible details at same timee required soft skills
Adaptability skills
Team spirit
Client Focus

Title: Data Analyst
HTML:
At Bloq.it, we’ve created the world’s leading smart locker solution. Solving online deliveries by enabling everyone to participate easily, reducing delivery costs and making them more sustainable.

We’re quickly expanding, and after growing at 1000% for three years in a row, we’re now the fastest-growing Smart Locker company in the world and one of the fastest growing scale-ups in Europe.

We are in search of a Data Analyst to join our innovative team as our new #bloqstar! As a Data Analyst within our Operations Strategy team, you'll help build the analytical infrastructure that powers decision-making across field operations in nine countries - you'll be a translator of business and operational requirements into analytical demands.

You'll report to the Data Analytics Manager and work hands-on with data, models, and AI-powered tools that have direct operational impact.

What You’ll Be Doing

  • Build and maintain KPI reporting infrastructure across operational markets, ensuring data accuracy and consistency;
  • Develop predictive models to support operational planning;
  • Contribute to AI-powered tools that reduce manual work at scale across our field operations teams;
  • Analyse large operational datasets to identify patterns, anomalies, and root causes of performance deviations;
  • Translate complex analytical outputs into clear, actionable insights for operational stakeholders;
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams (Operations, Product, Data Platform) to align on data definitions and business logic;
  • Support the migration and integration of data sources as our operational stack evolves.

What You’ll Bring To The Table

  • 2-4 years of experience in a data analyst or data scientist role;
  • Strong proficiency in Python, SQL, Spreadsheets (Excel or Google Sheets);
  • Experience building dashboards or reporting tools (Looker or similar);
  • Ability to work with messy, real-world operational data and turn it into reliable outputs;
  • Comfortable working in a fast-paced, ambiguous, environment where priorities regularly shift;
  • Strong communication skills: you can explain analytical work to non-technical stakeholders;
  • Strong business acumen: you understand operational context, ask the right questions, and know that analytical output is only as good as the problem framing behind it and the narrative presenting it.

It Would Be Great If You Would Also Have

  • Hands-on experience with machine learning frameworks;
  • Familiarity with cloud data environments and DevOps practices;
  • Experience in logistics, field services, or other operationally complex industries.

Why join us?

  • The opportunity to join our Operations Strategy team and play a pivotal role in contributing to innovative solutions that redefine Bloq.it's revolution in the smart locker industry ;
  • A dynamic and fast-paced work environment with a culture of innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning ;
  • Competitive salary and flexible benefits package, tailored to your experience and skills ;
  • Eligibility for performance-based bonus, tied to your results and designed to reward your impact ;
  • Work how you work best - we offer a remote-friendly policy and flexible hours so you can stay productive and keep life balanced ;
  • Portuguese Health Insurance including mental health ;
  • Flexible Sports and Wellness membership covering multiple gyms and studios ;
  • Unlimited days off (subject to manager approval).

We value diversity and solidarity within Bloq.it, this position is open to all candidates.

If you require any special arrangements during the recruitment process, please let us know so that we can accommodate you in the best possible way.

Ready to join the revolution?

At Bloq.it, we provide end-to-end solutions for Smart Lockers, and our software ecosystem, Bloq.it OS, is the leading tech solution available in the market.

We've had the pleasure of working with some of the biggest names in e-commerce, logistics, and retail in Europe, such as Vinted and DHL.

We have recently become the fastest-growing Smart Locker company in the world. Before Bloq.it the industry had stagnated and lacked innovation and good products. We strive to have the same impact in this industry as Tesla has had on the car industry.

We believe that Smart Lockers are a big part of the future for everyone, and we want to play our part in making sure that Smart Lockers become as mainstream as the mobile phone.

Title: Data Analytics Engineer
Description:
At Bose Corporation, we believe sound is the most powerful force on earth — and for over 60 years, we have been a company built on innovation, excellence, and independence. Privately owned, fiercely customer-focused, and driven by our values, we continue to lead industries and transform lives through sound.

Today, Bose Corporation is entering an exciting new era. Across multiple global Business Units and Global Functions, we are shaping the future of audio technology, automotive, luxury, and premium experiences. We invite you to join us in this transformation.

Job Description

We are looking for a Data Analytics Engineer within our Data and Analytics Center of Excellence in Portugal. The mission of this team is to develop world-class data science, machine learning, and statistical solutions to extract insights and enable data driven decisions that improve our business and enhance customer experiences.

This Data Analytics Engineer role will be critical to help drive analysis, data science, and reporting across many diverse data sets to make sure we deliver impact from our data products and services. This includes working with raw data sets that leads to development of logical and physical data models, data wrangling and design / building of semantic layer that helps to create dashboards and models that drive insights and actions. This work will directly inform and influence multiple division’s strategies. This is a unique opportunity to shape the experiences, technologies, and products that millions of people will use.

The ideal candidate has a deep understanding of data modeling, SQL, data warehouses / data lake and data engineering skills. You will often serve as an internal expert about the data, what it means and how it can be used to solve business problems. You can demonstrate that you have experience deeply understanding the data structure and transformations required to develop a semantic layer for data analysts and scientists. We are seeking a highly motivated, detail-oriented engineer who is passionate about data and enabling data-driven decisions.

Primary Responsibilities


Assist in analyzing, cleaning, and transforming datasets, collaborating with analysts and business users to help create actionable metrics that solve business questions.
Write clean, efficient SQL queries and support the creation of reliable data structures to make data easily accessible and comprehendible.
Follow and contribute to analytical engineering standards and best practices under the guidance of senior team members.
Implement data quality tests and participate in ensuring the accuracy and reliability of data pipelines.
Maintain clear documentation and apply strong coding best practices within daily analytical engineering tasks.
Learn specific data domains and help prepare analytical datasets to support ad-hoc business analysis.
Participate in requirement-gathering sessions alongside the team to clearly understand and help scope analytical requests from business, product, and software stakeholders.


Qualifications And Work Experience


Practical experience in data analytics or relevant quantitative roles, demonstrating the ability to apply data concepts to real-world business challenges.
Strong grasp of relational databases and a keen interest in learning modern data transformation and modeling techniques, focusing on the logic and "why" behind the data.
Solid foundational data skills with an eagerness to expand knowledge into data architecture and modeling. Any hands-on experience with modern data tools (e.g., Snowflake, dbt, GitHub, or similar) is considered an advantage, but a passion for learning them is key.
Clear communication skills, with the ability to discuss data findings and collaborate effectively with diverse groups of stakeholders.
A curious, life-long learner with a genuine passion for data, who takes initiative to solve problems and continuously seeks to grow their technical and analytical skills.
Ability to work collaboratively within Agile teams, showing enthusiasm, adaptability, and a commitment to delivering high-quality outcomes.


Education


Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in math, physics, computer science, engineering, business, finance, marketing, economics or related quantitative or computational field


Work Experience


2+ years of related data analytics experience in relevant consulting, finance, data science or market intelligence functions
Previous experience in a consumer electronics environment, particularly in a technical field, is a definite plus
Previous experience with mobile app data is a plus


What's In It For You


Be a part of and work with a top notch, multidisciplinary, transparent, and agile team.
Collaborate with people like you who want to solve problems and have fun together.
Work on developing innovative Wellness products that improve people's lives.
Excellent work life balance and a continuous learning environment.
Highly competitive package as well as a comprehensive benefits program.
We strive to help our employees and customers reach their fullest potential.


Are you interested in this position?

We’d love to know you better! Submit your application, by uploading your CV in English via the “Apply” button above.

For further information about the position please contact us via ITCareers_Portugal@bose.com.

Note

Thanks in advance for your application. After the online phase, the most successful candidates will be invited for an interview. In case you’re not contacted in the next 15 days, we will keep your application for future opportunities that may suit your profile best.

Are you interested in this position?

We’d love to know you better! Submit your application by uploading your CV in English via the “Apply” button above.

‎

‎

Our goal is to create an atmosphere where every candidate feels supported and empowered in the interviewing process. Diversity and inclusion are integral to our success, and we believe that providing reasonable accommodation is not only a legal obligation but also a fundamental aspect of our commitment to being an employer of choice. We recognize that individuals may have different needs and requirements based on their abilities, and we provide reasonable accommodations to ensure ideal conditions are met during the application process.

Title: Data & Analytics Engineer
HTML:
We are looking for a Data Engineer to join our team.What you'll do:

  • Partner with business stakeholders to identify data-driven opportunities and translate business needs into technical solutions;

  • Design, build, and maintain scalable data pipelines and data models to support analytics, reporting, and AI/ML initiatives;

  • Develop and maintain data products, reporting solutions, and self-service analytics using modern data lake architectures;

  • Process, transform, and integrate structured and unstructured data while ensuring data quality, governance, and reliability;

  • Analyze data from multiple sources to generate insights and support business decision-making;

  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to deploy data solutions and monitor their performance throughout their lifecycle;

  • Leverage cloud technologies and modern data platforms to build scalable and efficient data solutions;

  • Communicate insights through clear visualizations and reports tailored to both technical and business audiences;

  • Contribute to continuous improvement initiatives, promoting best practices in data management and analytics.

What you will need to bring:

  • Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Mathematics, Data Science, or a related field;

  • 4+ years of experience in Data Engineering, Data Analytics, or Data Management;

  • Strong experience designing and maintaining data pipelines and working with large datasets;

  • Advanced SQL and Python skills for data processing and analysis;

  • Experience with cloud platforms, preferably AWS, and modern data lake architectures;

  • Solid knowledge of data modelling, ETL processes, and data governance principles;

  • Experience with data visualization and reporting tools such as AWS QuickSight, Power BI (Microsoft Fabric), or Qlik Sense;

  • Familiarity with Agile methodologies (Scrum);

  • Knowledge of Git and collaborative development workflows is a plus;

  • Experience with SSIS, Infrastructure as Code (IaC), R, or object-oriented programming is considered an advantage;

  • Strong analytical, communication, and stakeholder management skills;

  • Fluent English is mandatory; Portuguese is highly valued.**

What we can offer:

  • Integration into an innovative and data-driven environment with international projects;

  • Opportunity to work with modern cloud and data technologies;

  • Continuous learning and professional development;

  • Career progression within challenging data and analytics initiatives.

By applying, you accept our GDPR policies. Your personal data in your CV and documents will be used solely for processing your application at SYONE. SYONE, S.A. (NIPC 504729624) is the data controller, located at Rua Alfredo da Silva, 8-A, Edifício Stern, Piso 3D, 2610-016 Amadora. We will use your data to tailor your application to relevant vacancies and for potential employment contracts. If selected, your data will be kept during your employment and for at least two years after. If not selected, your data will be kept for two years for future vacancies and then deleted, except for your contact details. You can exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, etc.) by emailing data.privacy@syone.com. Your data may be shared with our HR service providers and will be stored securely. You can withdraw your consent at any time. We will not use your data for other purposes without your express consent. For more information, email data.privacy@syone.com.

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
Charging your car should feel as natural as charging your phone. That's the future we're building: a network of EV chargers where life happens. We don't just install chargers. We accelerate sustainable mobility. We obsess over partnerships. We grow relentlessly: our network, our partners, ourselves.

If you're here, you're probably not looking for "just a job." Neither are we. 😎 We're driven by impact, and always looking for people who thrive on turning bold ideas into reality. If that sounds like you, you'll feel at home here. We're looking for people who see challenges as puzzles, not problems, thrive in fast-growing, high-energy environments, and want to shape the future of mobility, not just watch it unfold. At Powerdot, you'll get freedom, ownership, and responsibility. The space to experiment. The chance to scale your ideas. And a team that's always pushing the edge of what's possible.

🚀 About This Role

As our Data Analyst, you'll be part of the Central Data team at Powerdot and will play a key role in the current phase of accelerated growth. Your mission is to transform raw data into clear, actionable insights that power smarter decisions across the business — ensuring every team has the visibility they need to move fast and move well. The ideal candidate has strong analytical and problem-solving skills, combined with the ability to communicate effectively with both technical and non-technical audiences.

How You'll Shape Our Story:

Your day-to-day will include

Gathering and transforming data from a variety of sources — including internal databases, external APIs, and surveys, ensuring data is ready for analysis.
Analyzing data using statistical techniques — identifying trends, patterns, and insights that drive smarter business decisions.
Developing data visualizations — creating clear, compelling dashboards and reports that communicate findings to stakeholders in a concise and actionable way.
Partnering with stakeholders — understanding their needs and developing data-driven solutions that address real business questions.
Championing data quality — maintaining and supporting a culture of strong data quality across teams and workflows.
Staying ahead of analytics trends — keeping up-to-date on the latest tools, techniques, and best practices in data analytics.
Mentoring colleagues — coaching co-workers on analytics best practices and helping elevate the team's overall data capability.

This Is About You, Not Us 🫵🏼:

Up to 4 years of experience in data analytics or a related field.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills — you know how to break down complex questions and find the signal in the noise.
Technical proficiency — familiar with SQL, Python, and at least one data visualization tool such as Tableau, Metabase, or Power BI.
Eagerness to learn and develop — you thrive in a fast-moving environment and proactively grow your skills.
Great communication skills — you can translate technical findings into clear narratives for non-technical audiences.
Comfort with ambiguity and complexity — you navigate unstructured problems with ease and bring clarity to chaos.
Ability to work independently and as part of a team — you're self-driven but collaborative when it counts.

The Kind of Energy We're Looking For:

We're not into titles, egos, or corporate buzzwords. We're into people who make things happen.

You lead and listen. Whether you're steering the ship or rowing alongside the crew, you bring others with you and keep communication wide open.
You own your stuff. You don't wait for instructions: you see an opportunity, grab it, and make it better than anyone expected.
You've got a green heartbeat. Sustainability isn't just cool, it's core. You care about doing work that leaves the world a little better than you found it.
You balance hustle with humanity. You love the buzz of in-person teamwork, but you also know when to recharge (pun totally intended 🔋).
You grow on purpose. You're hungry to learn, to stretch, and to build something meaningful, not just rack up LinkedIn bullet points.

How you'll be Powered up?

🏥 Private health insurance coverage
💪🏼 Gym membership to help you stay active
⏰ Flexible working hours: you own your time
🌍 Annual offsite where we celebrate the year's achievements and spend quality time together (this year we went to Algarve, Portugal!)
🤝🏼 Regular team-building events with your local teammates
📚 English Training — as English is our language used to connect with all markets and teams
🍩 Free office snacks and unlimited coffee & Meal allowance for every worked day
⚡️ Special discounts for charging your electric vehicle

Our Promise To You

The best solutions come from different voices. We're building a culture where inclusion, respect, and equal opportunity aren't policies — they're lived every day. At Powerdot, everyone has the space to speak up, challenge the status quo, and make a difference. Your voice powers the future — literally.
