Join us as a Business Intelligence /Data Analytics Engineer Trainee!

As a Business Intelligence /Data analytics Engineer Trainee you will design, build, and maintain scalable analytics solutions that transform raw data into actionable insights. You will work closely with business stakeholders, data engineers, and analysts to deliver reliable data models, dashboards, and reporting solutions that support strategic and operational decision-making.

Key Accountabilities

You will primarily be responsible for:

  • Assist in collecting, cleaning, transforming, and validating data from multiple sources.
  • Perform exploratory data analysis (EDA) to identify trends, anomalies, and business insights.
  • Develop and evaluate machine learning models for supervised and unsupervised learning tasks.
  • Prepare datasets for statistical analysis and predictive modelling.
  • Stay current with emerging technologies, tools, and best practices in data engineering, analytics, and data science.
  • Designing and maintaining semantic data models (star/snowflake schemas) optimized for analytics and reporting.
  • Building and optimizing ETL/ELT pipelines from multiple data sources, ensuring data quality and consistency.
  • Ensure data quality, consistency and performance across business intelligence solutions.
  • Developing and maintaining dashboards and reports using BI tools such as Power BI, Python and R.
  • Translating business requirements into robust BI solutions and flexible Power BI semantic models.
  • Optimizing SQL queries, data models and report performance for large-scale datasets, monitoring BI workloads in cloud and on-premises environments.
  • Collaborating with business users to understand KPIs, metrics and reporting needs, and partnering with Data Engineers, Data Scientists and Product teams.
  • Providing guidance and best practices to analysts and report developers.
  • Defining and enforcing data standards, naming conventions and documentation, supporting data lineage and metadata management.
  • Ensuring compliance with security and privacy requirements.

Knowledge, Skills And Experience Required

  • Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Engineering or related fields.
  • Eligible for an IEFP Level VI Internship.
  • Good programming skills; knowledge of python, C#.
  • Machine learning model development and evaluation.
  • Data wrangling using libraries such as Pandas/Modin, Polars, NumPy.
  • Knowledge of multiple databases such as SQLServer, PostgreSQL, DuckDB.
  • API-based data ingestion.
  • Strong SQL skills and experience with data warehouses (e.g. Snowflake, Azure Synapse, Big Query, Redshift, SQL Server).
  • Hands-on with Power BI (semantic models, DAX, DirectQuery) and ETL/ELT tools (SSIS, ADF, Airflow, dbt, SSIS or similar).
  • Knowledge of Microsoft Fabric and Azure Foundry (Nice to have).
  • Knowledge of data modelling techniques (Kimball, dimensional modelling).
  • Analytical mindset with the ability to translate business needs into data models and KPIs.
  • Excellent communication skills with both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
  • Organized, able to manage multiple priorities and share knowledge effectively.
  • Fluent in English, with good verbal, written and interpersonal communication skills.
  • Nice to have: experience with cloud platforms (Azure, AWS), Python, DevOps/CI-CD for BI, data governance frameworks.

Apply by submitting your CV in English.

Join Euronext – Shape capital markets for future generations.

Euronext is the leading European capital market covering the entire capital markets value chain, from listing, trading, clearing, settlement and custody to solutions for issuers and investors. We operate seven national stock exchanges, handling 25% of European lit equity trading. Our products include equities, FX, ETFs, bonds, derivatives, commodities and indices. Euronext also provides clearing and settlement services through Euronext Clearing and our network of Euronext Securities CSDs. In addition, Euronext runs MTS, one of Europe’s leading electronic fixed income trading markets, and Nord Pool, the European power market. The company has a diverse domestic and international client base.

Euronext Values

Unity

  • We respect and value the people we work with
  • We are unified through a common purpose
  • We embrace diversity and strive for inclusion

Integrity

  • We value transparency, communicate honestly and share information openly
  • We act with integrity in everything we do
  • We don’t hide our mistakes, and we learn from them

Agility

  • We act with a sense of urgency and decisiveness
  • We are adaptable, responsive and embrace change
  • We take smart risks

Energy

  • We are positively driven to make a difference and challenge the status quo
  • We focus on and encourage personal leadership
  • We motivate each other with our ambition

Accountability

  • We deliver maximum value to our customers and stakeholders
  • We take ownership and are accountable for the outcome
  • We reward and celebrate performance

We are proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate against individuals on the basis of race, gender, age, citizenship, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, disability, or any other legally protected factor. We value the unique talents of all our people, who come from diverse backgrounds with different personal experiences and points of view and we are committed to providing an environment of mutual respect.

Additional Information

This job description is only describing the main activities within a certain role and is not exhaustive. It does not prevent to add more tasks, projects.

Title: Data Engineer (f/m/d)
Description:
A Snapshot of Your Day

Join our dynamic team as a Data Engineer, where your technical, analytical, and product expertise will truly shine! Dive into analysing and evaluating our products to align with D&A’s current and future needs, identifying performance opportunities that drive impactful results. Collaborate closely with the product team to provide valuable insights and recommendations for improvement and leverage AI while doing so. Your ability to communicate ideas effectively and demonstrate strong design architecture will be key as you build business relationships, translating requirements into actionable solutions. Take ownership of defining the future technology of the team and mentor others across the team to make the role your own.

How You’ll Make An Impact


Engage in product and project management, collaborating with the product team to enhance product understanding and performance with robust solution designs.
Communicate and demonstrate design architecture while considering business requirements and value.
Build strong business relationships, translating client needs into actionable requirements.
Define and analyse metrics that gauge product success and monitor D&A product adoption in the market.
Develop reusable components, standardized templates, and reference architectures to apply data & analytics best practices consistently.



What You Bring


Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Mathematics, Engineering, Physics, or related field; Master’s degree is a plus.
Extensive experience collaborating with product teams, including management, engineering, design, data science, and data engineering.
Excellent analytical skills with a proven ability to make data-driven decisions and effectively communicate results.
Experience in product optimization, including funnel/website optimization and outbound communication channels like email or push notifications.
Proven expertise in AWS Services, in-depth knowledge of AWS IaC options, expert knowledge of Python; familiarity with other languages and frameworks is a plus.
Proven track record in solution design, with a drive to research and implement new technologies, including AI in development and product use cases. Fluency in English; knowledge of German or other languages is a plus.



About The Team

Our Gas Services division offers Low-emission power generation through service and decarbonization. Zero or low emission power generation and all gas turbines under one roof, steam turbines and generators. Decarbonization opportunities through service offerings, modernization, and digitalization of the fleet.

Who is Siemens Energy?

At Siemens Energy, we are more than just an energy technology company. With ~100,000 dedicated employees in more than 90 countries, we develop the energy systems of the future, ensuring that the growing energy demand of the global community is met reliably and sustainably. The technologies created in our research departments and factories drive the energy transition and provide the base for one sixth of the world's electricity generation.

Our global team is committed to making sustainable, reliable, and affordable energy a reality by pushing the boundaries of what is possible. We uphold a 150-year legacy of innovation that encourages our search for people who will support our focus on decarbonization, new technologies, and energy transformation.

Find out how you can make a difference at Siemens Energy: https://www.siemens-energy.com/employeevideo

Our Commitment to Diversity

Lucky for us, we are not all the same. Through diversity we generate power. We run on inclusion and our combined creative energy is fueled by over 130 nationalities. Siemens Energy celebrates character – no matter what ethnic background, gender, age, religion, identity, or disability. We energize society, all of society, and we do not discriminate based on our differences.

We will ensure that individuals with disabilities are provided reasonable accommodation to participate in the job application or interview process, to perform essential job functions, and to receive other benefits and privileges of employment. Please contact us to request accommodation.

Rewards/Benefits


Competitive salary and meal allowance
Fair compensation for international work
Health insurance coverage
Remote work permitted within Portugal
Additional 5 “Pontes” days off and Birthday off if it falls on a weekday, when not abroad
Amongst others



https://jobs.siemens-energy.com/jobs

Title: Distributed Cloud | Power BI Specialist
Description:
At Devoteam, we believe that technology with strong human values can actively drive change for the better. Discover how Tech for People unlocks the future, creating a positive impact on the people and the world around us. We are a global leading player in Digital Transformation for leading organisations across EMEA, with a revenue of €1B. We believe in transforming technology to create value for our clients, partners and employees in a world where technology is developed for people. We are proud of the culture we have built together. We are proud of our people at the service of technology. We are proud of our diverse environment. Because we are #TechforPeople. Join our multidisciplinary team of Cloud experts, Designers, Business consultants, Security experts, Engineers, Developers and other extraordinary talents, spread across more than 20 EMEA countries. Become one of our +10.000 tech and business leaders on cloud, data and cyber security. Let’s fuse creativity with technology together and build innovative solutions that actively change things for the better.

Job Description

We are seeking a sharp and insightful Power BI Specialist to drive our Business Intelligence initiatives. You will be instrumental in translating complex business requirements into clear data models and compelling visualizations, ensuring strategic decision-making across the organization.

Key Responsibilities:


Design and develop dynamic dashboards and reports using Power BI to monitor key performance indicators (KPIs) and provide actionable business insights.
Gather and translate business requirements into technical specifications for data modeling and reporting solutions.
Develop, optimize, and execute SQL queries to extract, transform, and prepare data for analysis.
Perform data validation and collaborate with stakeholders to ensure data integrity and quality.
Drive the adoption of self-service BI best practices across the business.



Qualifications


3+ years of proven experience as a Data Analyst or BI Developer.
Strong mandatory proficiency in SQL for querying and manipulating data.
Expert hands-on experience with Microsoft Power BI for data modeling (DAX) and visualization.
Proven ability to successfully elicit and document business requirements.
Language Requirement: Professional fluency (B2+) in French is highly valued and may be a mandatory requirement for allocation on specific projects with Francophone clients.



Additional Information

The Devoteam Group works for equal opportunities, promoting its employees based on merit and actively fights against all forms of discrimination. We are convinced that diversity contributes to the creativity, dynamism and excellence of our organization. All of our vacancies are open to people with disabilities.

Title: Data Engineer
Description:
Queremos fazer diferente com o essencial.




Apostamos numa estratégia de corporativismo sustentável. Acreditamos que o sucesso se baseia na construção de uma equipa centrada no bem-estar coletivo, no desenvolvimento pessoal e profissional, e assente numa filosofia de trabalho que potencie a gestão saudável das nossas vidas. Work-life balance, beginner’s mind e community involvement são a nossa identidade, os nossos fundamentos e a nossa cultura.




O que precisas para te juntar a nós:




Desenvolvimento Python, com foco em engenharia/processamento de dados
SQL para data querying e validação de dados
Sólida experiência na construção de pipelines ETL/ELT




O que temos para te oferecer:




- Gestão de Talento personalizada. Valorizamos e privilegiamos um acompanhamento próximo e regular, somos uma equipa desde o primeiro dia.




- Pacote de benefícios amplo e flexível. Seguro de saúde, seguro de vida e acidentes pessoais, descontos e benefícios, plano de telecomunicações e muito mais.




- Apostamos na formação e na tua carreira. Formação certificada, plataformas de formação online, centro de exames Pearson VUE... Apostamos em ti!




- Sustentabilidade e envolvimento comunitário. Queremos dar significado ao nosso trabalho e investir num projeto de consultoria inclusivo. Para isso, precisamos da tua ajuda.







Senioridade: Mid/Sen

Idiomas: Português ( obrigatório); Inglês ( preferencial)

Local: Porto

Juntas-te a nós?










Na Team IT defendemos a igualdade e valorizamos a diversidade.

Criamos um ambiente seguro, diversificado e onde as oportunidades são iguais para todos!

Não discriminamos com base em idade, etnia, orientação sexual, género, deficiência ou qualquer fator que não seja o mérito.

Todas as candidaturas com competências para o cargo são bem-vindas!

Title: Data Engineer (Porto or Lisbon)
Description:
Who are we ?

Quanteam, founding entity of RAINBOW PARTNERS, is a consulting firm specialized in Banking and Financial Services. With more than 1200 consultants across 10 countries, we combine business and IT expertise to support leading institutions in transformation projects.

Our core areas:

➡Quantitative Finance

➡Risk & Compliance

➡Operations & Finance

➡Transformation & Organization

➡ Information Systems.




🔎 We are looking for a Data Engineer

📝 MAIN TASKS

Design, develop, and maintain secure, scalable, and high-performance data pipelines using Azure Data Factory, Azure Databricks, Azure Synapse, Microsoft Fabric, and Azure SQL.
Build and optimize ETL/ELT processes to support data integration, transformation, and analytics initiatives.
Develop solutions using PySpark and SQL, ensuring efficient data processing and performance.
Design, implement, and optimize SQL queries, stored procedures, functions, and database objects.
Collaborate closely with Data Engineers, Data Scientists, BI teams, and business stakeholders to ensure data quality, consistency, and accessibility.
Implement and support BI data models that enable data-driven decision-making across the organization.
Monitor, troubleshoot, and continuously improve data platform performance, reliability, and scalability.
Contribute to the design and implementation of modern cloud-based data architectures, including Lakehouse environments.
Ensure compliance with development standards, best practices, governance, and security requirements.
Provide technical recommendations and actively contribute to continuous improvement initiatives.
Support project teams with a consulting-oriented mindset, helping translate business requirements into technical solutions.




🧩 YOUR PROFILE AND SKILLS

Minimum 3 years of experience as a Data Engineer or in a similar data-focused role.
Strong hands-on experience with Azure Data Factory, Azure Databricks, Azure Synapse, Microsoft Fabric, and Azure SQL.
Solid programming skills in PySpark and SQL.
Experience developing and maintaining ETL/ELT data integration solutions.
Strong understanding of cloud-based data architectures and modern data platforms.
Experience working with Lakehouse architectures and large-scale data environments.
Ability to analyze technical requirements and propose effective data solutions.
Strong problem-solving skills, critical thinking, and attention to detail.
Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.
Consulting mindset with a proactive and customer-oriented approach.
Strong sense of ownership, accountability, and teamwork.
English level B2 minimum.
Location: Porto or Lisbon (depends on your location)

Nice to Have:

Experience with SQL Server, SSIS, SSAS, and SSRS.
Knowledge of Azure Logic Apps, Azure Functions, Azure Key Vault, Log Analytics, and related Azure services.
Experience with Power BI, including semantic modeling and DAX.
Knowledge of Snowflake, dbt, Apache Airflow, or other cloud data platforms.
Familiarity with DevOps practices and CI/CD pipelines for data engineering solutions.
Experience with data modeling, reporting, and data visualization initiatives.




🎁 WHAT WE OFFER

This role offers a gross annual salary between 28.000€ to 60.000€, defined according to the candidate’s experience and competencies.
Permanent contract (CTI).
Meal allowance.
Health Insurance.
Extra holiday: Christmas Eve or New Year’s Eve.
Access to Quanteam Academy for continuous learning and certifications.
Elevate Program to support professional development and career growth.
Career progression plan.
Ongoing follow-up and technical support provided by a Consultant Expert.

Title: Data Engineer (Hybrid @Porto)
Description:
We’re looking for the special, unique and amazing YOU!

@ KCS IT, we look for the ones that stands out, for those that always wants to be better and fight for it, and for those who has the same values that we do: dedication, energy, integrity, transparency, flexibility, trust, honesty, hard work, proactivity, team work.

At KCS we stand for equality and value diversity. We create a safe, diverse environment where opportunities are equal for everyone! We do not discriminate based on age, ethnicity, sexual orientation, gender, disability or any factor other than merit. All applications with skills for the position are welcome!




We are looking for an Amazing: Data Engineer

Seniority: 6+

Type of position: Hybrid (2x/week at Porto Office)




The amazing you, will have:

Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field;
6+ years of experience as a Data Engineer;
Expertise on end-to-end Data Pipeline Development, ETL processes and Alteryx;
Knowledge in Data Mesh concepts (Starburst, Trino);
Proficiency in programming languages such as Python, Java, or Scala;
Strong knowledge of SQL and NoSQL databases;
Experience with Big Data technologies such as Databricks, Hadoop, Apache Spark, Kafka;
Availability for a hybrid regime at Porto (Portugal);
Fluency in English is mandatory.




To turn yourself from amazing to unique, you´ll have (plus):

French AND/OR Portuguese fluency.







Why should you become part of our family?

You can develop a career that fits you: your career development is personalized, taking in consideration your needs and goals from a short to long term
Interesting Challenges Ahead: you can work for several clients from different sectors of activity
Free training programs: Our training and certification programs in languages, tech, behavior and business will help you to reach your full potential faster
International projects in Benelux: you can gain international experience in Benelux and balance a new way of living with work
Type of projects (depending on the project you might find one of this types of projects):
In hybrid Systems: Is important to balance work with socialization, that´s why a hybrid system works for us and for you
Full Remote projects: If you want to work while you enjoy the comfort of your home
Full Onsite projects: if you prefere the company of your colleagues!
Take care of your well-being: Enjoy our free nutrition, psicologist, general medicine appointments and our yoga and personal training days… all remote!




Who are we?




Founded in 2008 and based in Lisbon, KCS IT is a consulting company in the field of Information Technology and Services, focused on creating value for our clients through three main areas: Consulting, Outsourcing, Inovation and Training. Our commitment to talent development is unmistakable in the recent opening of the Porto and Azores hubs, which aims to develop technology for the national and international market. Since 2018 we have been elected one of the 10 major companies in the “Index of Excellence”, an initiative that aims to reward organizations that invest most in the development and satisfaction of their employees.

The amazing you, will have:

  • Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field;
  • 6+ years of experience as a Data Engineer;
  • Expertise on end-to-end Data Pipeline Development, ETL processes and Alteryx;
  • Knowledge in Data Mesh concepts (Starburst, Trino);
  • Proficiency in programming languages such as Python, Java, or Scala;
  • Strong knowledge of SQL and NoSQL databases;
  • Experience with Big Data technologies such as Databricks, Hadoop, Apache Spark, Kafka;
  • Availability for a hybrid regime at Porto (Portugal);
  • Fluency in English is mandatory.


To turn yourself from amazing to unique, you´ll have (plus):

  • French AND/OR Portuguese fluency.



Why should you become part of our family?

  • You can develop a career that fits you: your career development is personalized, taking in consideration your needs and goals from a short to long term
  • Interesting Challenges Ahead: you can work for several clients from different sectors of activity
  • Free training programs: Our training and certification programs in languages, tech, behavior and business will help you to reach your full potential faster
  • International projects in Benelux: you can gain international experience in Benelux and balance a new way of living with work
  • Type of projects (depending on the project you might find one of this types of projects):
  • In hybrid Systems: Is important to balance work with socialization, that´s why a hybrid system works for us and for you
  • Full Remote projects: If you want to work while you enjoy the comfort of your home
  • Full Onsite projects: if you prefere the company of your colleagues!
  • Take care of your well-being: Enjoy our free nutrition, psicologist, general medicine appointments and our yoga and personal training days… all remote!


Who are we?


Founded in 2008 and based in Lisbon, KCS IT is a consulting company in the field of Information Technology and Services, focused on creating value for our clients through three main areas: Consulting, Outsourcing, Inovation and Training. Our commitment to talent development is unmistakable in the recent opening of the Porto and Azores hubs, which aims to develop technology for the national and international market. Since 2018 we have been elected one of the 10 major companies in the “Index of Excellence”, an initiative that aims to reward organizations that invest most in the development and satisfaction of their employees.

Title: Engenharia Informática / Sistemas de Informação
Description:
Oportunidade de Estágio Profissional IEFP - Engenharia Informática (m/f)

Encontramo-nos em processo de recrutamento para selecionar um(a) Engenheiro(a) Informático(a), elegível para Estágio Profissional ao abrigo da Medida +Talento do IEFP.

Esta oportunidade tem foco no desenvolvimento de competências em infraestrutura digital, suporte especializado e otimização de sistemas.




Principais Responsabilidades

Gestão de Infraestrutura: Apoiar na manutenção, monitorização e estabilidade de servidores, redes e plataformas internas.
Desenvolvimento e Integração: Colaborar na atualização do ecossistema digital da organização e na integração de APIs.
Suporte Técnico de Nível 2: Diagnosticar e proceder à resolução de incidentes de hardware e software, assegurando o apoio à equipa interna.
Segurança e Dados: Implementar e supervisionar rotinas de backup, aplicar boas práticas de cibersegurança e garantir a organização de bases de dados.
Automação de Processos: Desenvolver soluções e mecanismos de automação (através de scripts ou ferramentas específicas) para a otimização da eficiência operacional.




Perfil indicado:

Habilitações Literárias: Licenciatura em Engenharia Informática, Ciências da Computação ou áreas académicas equivalentes.
Elegibilidade: Requisito obrigatório de elegibilidade para Estágio Profissional IEFP (Medida +Talento).
Competências Técnicas: Conhecimentos consolidados em linguagens de programação (preferencialmente Python, JavaScript, HTML) e em bases de dados SQL.
Competências Comportamentais: Espírito crítico, forte capacidade analítica, autonomia e aptidão para a resolução de problemas (troubleshooting).
Orientação Profissional: Atitude proativa, com foco na inovação contínua e na segurança da informação.




Condições Oferecidas:

Bolsa de Estágio e Subsídio de Alimentação em estrita conformidade com os regulamentos da Medida +Talento do IEFP.
Integração num ambiente tecnológico dinâmico, com forte cultura de partilha de conhecimento e mentoria.
Perspetiva de evolução na carreira e possibilidade de integração futura nos quadros da empresa.

Title: Data Quality Analyst (AI Model Data Analyst)
Description:
Job Type: Full-time, Permanent

Location: Portugal (1-2 days in office per week)

Travel: Occasional international travel may be required.

Salary: €16,000–€20,000 per annum

Focal Systems is the industry leader in retail AI solutions. Our mission is to automate and optimize brick-and-mortar retail using deep-learning computer vision. Focal has been deployed at scale with the top retailers in the world. We are looking for smart, creative, and passionate people who love to learn, enjoy thinking critically, share our values, and want to build a great and enduring company.

We have built the next-generation operating system for brick & mortar retail. This OS leverages shelf-mounted cameras that constantly measure the state of the retailers’ shelves and use that information to order quicker and smarter, planogram better, and schedule, direct, train, and manage their staff. We have proven this with major retailers around the world.

Job Description

The quality of our computer-vision models depends entirely on the quality of the data they learn from. We are seeking a dedicated Data Quality Analyst to clean, review, and curate the training data that powers our systems. In this role you will assume accountability for the accuracy and consistency of our datasets, directly improving how well our models detect products. Meticulous attention to detail, strong data-handling skills, and the ability to meet quality and speed Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) are essential.

What You Will Be Doing


Review, clean, and correct labelled image and product data used to train our computer-vision models.
Identify and fix mislabelled, inconsistent, or low-quality data, and flag systematic errors in the labelling pipeline.
Conduct routine quality-assurance checks to catch data issues before they reach model training.
Onboard and scan products into the system, ensuring catalogue and reference data are accurate and complete.
Compare model predictions against ground truth to surface edge cases and areas where the model underperforms.
Work collaboratively with the machine-learning and operations teams to improve labelling guidelines and data standards.
Meet or exceed speed and quality Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) consistently.
Communicate effectively with supervisors and team members, providing updates on progress and raising any issues or challenges encountered.


Requirements:


Strong attention to detail and a genuine care for data accuracy and consistency.
Comfort working with large volumes of data, spreadsheets, and data-review or annotation tools
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to spot patterns and root-cause data errors.
An interest in or exposure to machine learning, computer vision, or AI data pipelines is advantageous but not essential.
Time Management: ability to work well under pressure, meet deadlines, and ensure timely completion of assigned tasks.
Communication Skills: effective communication to liaise with supervisors, team members, and the ML team, providing updates and raising issues.
Ability to work independently and stay focused on repetitive, detail-heavy tasks for extended periods.


Why Focal Systems


Strong Values and Mission — We are a tightly-knit team with an ambitious mission and a strong set of core values, which define our approach to business and have successfully guided us since inception.
Exceptional Team — We are a team of hard-working, fun-loving professionals from some of the most eminent universities, research labs, and tech companies of our time. We pride ourselves on recruiting exceptional individuals to help us redefine the state-of-the-art.
Outstanding Partners — We work with 10+ of the largest retailers in the world and have a world-class roster of investors, advisors and partners to support & advise us in our endeavors.


What we offer

We care deeply about the health, happiness, and wellbeing of all of our employees. We offer:


Paid Time Off
Pension
Sick Leave

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
Sobre a equipa

Como Data Analyst farás parte da nossa equipa de Data Intelligence, onde oferecemos soluções inovadoras na área da saúde para melhorar a eficiência e a qualidade do percurso do paciente, antecipando todas as suas necessidades.

Sobre a role


Criar e manter dashboards e relatórios em Power BI para diferentes perfis de utilizador — desde gestores operacionais a equipas clínicas
Colaborar com stakeholders das unidades de saúde para levantar requisitos, validar métricas e garantir que os outputs respondem às necessidades reais
Desenvolver e manter pipelines de dados (ETL/SSIS) para integração de fontes heterogéneas presentes em unidades de saúde
Construir e otimizar queries T-SQL para extração, transformação e análise de dados clínicos e operacionais
Garantir a qualidade, consistência e documentação dos dados ao longo do ciclo de vida dos produtos
Participar ativamente na implementação dos produtos de dados nos clientes, incluindo formação e suporte


Que skills procuramos?


2 a 4 anos de experiência em funções de análise de dados ou Business Intelligence
Conhecimento e experiência em SQL / T-SQL
Experiência prática com SSIS ou processos de ETL equivalentes
Experiência prática com SSAS, Modelação e Calculations MDX
Capacidade para desenvolver relatórios e dashboards em Power BI (modelação de dados, DAX, boas práticas de visualização)
Familiaridade com o setor da saúde — sistemas de informação clínica, terminologias ou processos hospitalares são valorizados
Perfil analítico, orientado ao detalhe e com boa capacidade de comunicação com perfis não técnicos


Valorizamos ainda:


Experiência na área da saúde
Autonomia na gestão de tarefas e proatividade


Quem somos?

Somos a Glintt Global, uma empresa de referência na Península Ibérica em Consultoria e Serviços Tecnológicos, com mais de 30 anos de experiência. Pretendemos impactar a qualidade de vida das pessoas, através da inovação, tecnologia, do conhecimento e da ambição que nos acompanham. Este é o nosso compromisso!

Encontra aqui mais sobre a Cultura global | Glintt Global!

Recruiting Privacy Policy

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
We are growing. And we are looking for talented people.




At Decskill, we believe that technological excellence is driven by human talent.

We are an IT consulting company with more than 10 years of consolidated experience in the market, focused on building long-term relationships with both our clients and our people. Today, we are a community of over 800 professionals, working from Lisbon, Porto, and Madrid, contributing to impactful technology initiatives.




As part of the Astek Group, we combine a strong local culture with a global presence, being active in around 23 countries across 4 continents. This allows us to offer an international context, diverse challenges, and long-term career opportunities, while staying close to our teams.




We are looking for an Data Engineer!




Responsibilities:

Perform analysis of internal and external data to identify business growth opportunities and support client strategy initiatives.
Ensure accurate tracking and delivery of KPIs aligned with client development goals and business roadmap.
Support global teams (London, New York, Hong Kong) by providing high-quality data insights, tools, and analysis to improve sales effectiveness and decision-making.
Produce high-value reports, dashboards, and documentation for regional and global client reviews.
Leverage multiple data sources to generate actionable insights on business performance, client profitability, and wallet share growth.
Promote and contribute to the automation of reporting and client intelligence deliverables in collaboration with business and IT teams.
Ensure data accuracy, consistency, and integrity across multiple data pipelines, dashboards, and reporting systems.
Support the development and improvement of client data processes, analytics frameworks, and reporting standards.




Requirements:

Technical Requirements

Strong experience in data analysis, business intelligence, or data engineering-related roles.
Solid knowledge of:
Data visualization and BI tools such as:
Tableau
Power BI
Strong programming skills in Python, particularly using Pandas for data analysis.
Strong knowledge of SQL and experience working with ETL processes.
Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel.
Knowledge of descriptive statistics and hypothesis testing.
Experience working with large, complex datasets and multi-source data environments.
Experience in report automation and data pipeline optimization is highly valued.

Soft Skills

Strong communication and presentation skills, with the ability to translate data into clear business insights.
Adaptability and ability to work in fast-paced, global environments.
Strong attention to detail and commitment to data quality and accuracy.
Results-driven mindset with strong delivery focus.
Problem-solving skills with the ability to design and improve analytical processes.
Proactive attitude and ability to work effectively within a team.
Strong collaboration skills across business and technical stakeholders.

Language Requirements

English: Mastery level (mandatory).




Are you looking for an environment that values curiosity and commitment? Here, your contribution has real impact and individual growth is taken seriously.




Find with us the right opportunity to grow!




What you can expect from us:

Long-term projects with national and international context (if applicable)
Opportunities to grow technically and professionally
A people-first culture, focused on transparency and trust
Teams that value ownership, collaboration and stability.




If you’re interested in this job please send your CV to cesaltina.abreu@decskill.com, with the reference “CA/DataAnalyst”.




Thank you! :)




Decskill is committed to equality and non-discrimination with all our talents. We recruit and promote talent, based on diversity and inclusion, regardless of age, gender, ethnicity, race, nationality or any other form of discrimination incompatible with the dignity of the human being.

Title: Assistente Financeiro
HTML:
A FPF pretende recrutar um(a) ASSISTENTE FINANCEIRO JÚNIOR para desempenhar as seguintes tarefas:


Funções:

  • Suporte nas tarefas administrativas e financeiras do departamento;
  • Lançamento e registo de documentos (Faturas e Recibos);
  • Auxílio na elaboração de relatórios financeiros;
  • Apoio na preparação de fechos mensais e anuais;
  • Arquivo e organização de documentação financeira;
  • Acompanhar a faturação emitida pela Organização;
  • Análise e conferência de contas correntes


Requisitos:

  • Formação superior em Gestão, Economia, Contabilidade, Finanças ou áreas similares;
  • Experiência mínima de 1 ano na função;
  • Conhecimentos do software PHC (preferencial);
  • Bons conhecimentos do idioma inglês (preferencial);
  • Regime presencial (obrigatório);
  • Disponibilidade para deslocações a Lisboa.


Perfil:

  • Orientação para o detalhe e sentido crítico;
  • Capacidade de organização, gestão de prioridades e orientação para objetivos e prazos;
  • Sentido de responsabilidade, autonomia e proatividade;
  • Boa capacidade de comunicação verbal e escrita;
  • Espírito de equipa e bom relacionamento interpessoal.


Compromisso de diversidade e inclusão

Na Federação Portuguesa de Futebol promovemos a igualdade de oportunidades e de tratamento das pessoas independentemente do sexo, idade, religião ou crença, diferentes capacidades, orientação sexual, ideologia política, raça ou etnia.

Title: Agent de back-office (on-site)
Description:
Condition d'éligibilité obligatoire : Ce recrutement s'adresse exclusivement aux candidats résidant déjà sur place. Aucun budget ni prise en charge financière ne sera accordé pour la relocalisation, le logement ou les déplacements.

Aperçu du poste

Vous maîtrisez parfaitement le français écrit et souhaitez dynamiser votre carrière dans une ville côtière européenne particulièrement vivante ?

Notre centre de services internationaux basé à Porto recrute un Opérateur Back-Office & Administration.

La particularité de cette mission ? Aucun contact téléphonique. Vous traiterez 100 % de vos tâches par écrit, via messagerie instantanée et courriels. En véritable pilier opérationnel, vous veillerez à offrir un service rigoureux, rapide et courtois.


Supports de communication : Échanges exclusivement écrits (e-mails entrants et Chat en direct).
Missions principales : Analyse des demandes techniques, vérification de la conformité des comptes clients et suivi des dossiers administratifs en français.
Modalités de travail : Poste situé à Porto. La prise de poste s'effectue sur site, avec des perspectives d'évolution vers un mode hybride selon les projets et l'organisation des équipes.



Rémunération et Avantages

Nous valorisons l'engagement, la précision et la régularité de nos collaborateurs grâce à un package global attractif :


Salaire de base (Niveau L2) : 1 120 € brut/mois (sur 14 mois).
Bonus d'intégration : 100 € par mois (versés d'office chaque mois durant vos 6 premiers mois).
Prime de présence : 25 € mensuels pour récompenser la ponctualité.
Allocation repas : Environ 126 € net par mois (versés directement sur votre fiche de paie).
Avantages sociaux : Assurance santé privée premium dès votre premier jour, réductions sur l'accès aux salles de sport et privilèges exclusifs auprès de nos partenaires.



Rémunération mensuelle estimée : Environ 1 371 € brut (cumul des primes courantes, hors versement des 13ᵉ et 14ᵉ mois).

Organisation du temps de travail

Pour vous assurer un bon équilibre entre vie professionnelle et personnelle, les horaires sont établis à l'avance selon un planning roulement :


Du lundi au vendredi : Plages horaires classiques de 09h00 à 18h00.
Le samedi : Permanences assurées par roulement entre 10h00 et 20h00.
Jours de repos : Le dimanche est un jour de repos fixe. En cas de travail le samedi, une journée de repos compensatoire est automatiquement attribuée en semaine.



Profil recherché


Langues : Niveau C1/C2 exigé en français (expression écrite irréprochable). Niveau B2 minimum en anglais pour maîtriser nos outils internes et documents techniques.
Aisance informatique : Capacité à naviguer rapidement sur différents logiciels CRM et à gérer plusieurs discussions simultanément.
Esprit d'analyse : Rigueur et souci du détail pour repérer rapidement les incohérences ou erreurs de saisie.
Savoir-être : Excellente qualité rédactionnelle, sens de la diplomatie et posture orientée solutions face aux demandes complexes.



Travailler à Porto

Rejoindre nos équipes à Porto, c'est adopter un cadre de vie exceptionnel. Entre son patrimoine historique, les rives du Douro et la proximité de l'océan, la ville offre un environnement stimulant. Son coût de la vie accessible comparé à d'autres métropoles d'Europe de l'Ouest vous permettra de profiter pleinement de votre quotidien.

Candidature

Vous vivez déjà au Portugal et ce profil vous correspond ? Envoyez-nous dès maintenant votre CV à jour en français ou en anglais !

Title: Data Analyst (HYBRID @Porto)
Description:
We’re looking for the special, unique and amazing YOU!

@ KCS IT, we look for the ones that stands out, for those that always wants to be better and fight for it, and for those who has the same values that we do: dedication, energy, integrity, transparency, flexibility, trust, honesty, hard work, proactivity, team work.

At KCS we stand for equality and value diversity. We create a safe, diverse environment where opportunities are equal for everyone! We do not discriminate based on age, ethnicity, sexual orientation, gender, disability or any factor other than merit. All applications with skills for the position are welcome!




We are looking for an Amazing: Data Analyst

Seniority: +3 years

Type of position: Hybrid (2x/week in Porto)




The amazing you, will have:

Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Statistics or Mathematics;
3+ years of experience as Data Analyst;
Proficiency with ETL, SQL, PowerBI and Alteryx;
Experience with Jaspersoft, VBA, API, Python and Tibco Spotfire are nice to have;
Ability to perform database queries;
Excellent problem-solving and critical-thinking skills;
Strong attention to detail and accuracy;
Ability to work collaboratively in a team environment;
Availability for a hybrid regime at Porto (Portugal);
Fluency in English is mandatory.







To turn yourself from amazing to unique, you´ll have (plus):

Comfort speaking French.




Why should you become part of our family?

You can develop a career that fits you: your career development is personalized, taking in consideration your needs and goals from a short to long term
Interesting Challenges Ahead: you can work for several clients from different sectors of activity
Free training programs: Our training and certification programs in languages, tech, behavior and business will help you to reach your full potential faster
International projects in Benelux: you can gain international experience in Benelux and balance a new way of living with work
Type of projects (depending on the project you might find one of this types of projects):
In hybrid Systems: Is important to balance work with socialization, that´s why a hybrid system works for us and for you
Full Remote projects: If you want to work while you enjoy the comfort of your home
Full Onsite projects: if you prefere the company of your colleagues!
Take care of your well-being: Enjoy our free nutrition, psicologist, general medicine appointments and our yoga and personal training days… all remote!




Who are we?

Founded in 2008 and based in Lisbon, KCS IT is a consulting company in the field of Information Technology and Services, focused on creating value for our clients through three main areas: Consulting, Outsourcing, Inovation and Training. Our commitment to talent development is unmistakable in the recent opening of the Porto, Leiria and Azores hubs, which aims to develop technology for the national and international market. Since 2018 we have been elected one of the 10 major companies in the “Index of Excellence”, an initiative that aims to reward organizations that invest most in the development and satisfaction of their employees.

Title: Técnico/a Superior de Prevenção
HTML:
Descrição:


Procuramos um/a Técnico/a Superior de Prevenção que contribua ativamente para a identificação, avaliação e controlo dos riscos laborais, assegurando o cumprimento das medidas preventivas e promovendo a sensibilização e formação contínua dos trabalhadores.


O que te oferecemos:


- Formação remunerada;

- Projeção laboral dentro da empresa;

- Acresce subsídios de alimentação e/ou outras variáveis.


Salário:


- Retribuição anual bruta de 46.641€ com progressão a 70.804€.


Jornada:


- Jornadas de segunda a sexta-feira.


Necessitamos que:


- Tenhas Licenciatura como Técnico Superior de Segurança no Trabalho ou similar;

- Tenhas disponibilidade para mobilidade geográfica;

- Tenhas experiência mínima de 2 anos em funções similares.


Tarefas:


A segurança dos nossos colaboradores é vista como imprescindível para nós. Pretendemos que a cultura de segurança e prevenção seja cumprida, assegurando a qualidade laboral a qual nos é associada. Nesse sentido, as tuas funções seriam:


− Controlo e seguimento das incidências nos centros de trabalho;

− Formação dos trabalhadores nos métodos de prevenção;

− Realização e avaliação de risco laboral e delinear medidas preventivas;

− Gestão e colaboração nas inspeções de trabalho com as autoridades;

− Gestão e atualização da documentação.

Title: Data Analyst – Commercial (m/f/d)
HTML:
Chemical Industry | Data Analyst – Commercial



Your new Company


Our client is a Global Recognized Organization operating at the forefront of advanced materials and specialty solutions. With a strong international footprint and a workforce of around 1 000 professionals.


Driven by deep scientific expertise and a strong commitment to innovation, the Organization leverages advanced capabilities in material sciences, formulation technologies, and surface modification to deliver tailored solutions.


With a clear focus on innovation, operational excellence, and professional development, this is an opportunity to join a Company that combines global scale with a dynamic and forward-thinking mindset.



Your new Role


The Data Analyst – Commercial transforms complex Datasets into clear, actionable insights that support decision making across the organization. Working within a Matrix structure and closely aligned with the Commercial function, this person partners with business stakeholders to understand priorities, interpret commercial Data, and deliver high-quality analysis, reporting, dashboards, and presentations.


This person reports to the Business Data Manager, and will collaborate closely with Commercial stakeholders, Business Leaders, Technical Specialists, and Data Governance teams to support performance cycles, improve reporting capabilities, and strengthen data-driven decision making across the business.


The Data Analyst – Commercial will:

  • Partner with Commercial stakeholders to understand business priorities and deliver Data-driven insights that support operational and strategic decision-making;
  • Produce accurate and timely management reporting, analyzing commercial performance and identifying trends, risks, opportunities, and deviations from plan;
  • Support functional performance cycles (including sales pipeline reviews, demand planning, SKU rationalization activities, and sales forecasting);
  • Execute and support Data creation, updates, clean-up, archiving, and deletion activities related to customer Data, pricing, rebates, discounts, commissions, sales areas, and commercial taxonomies;
  • Ensure commercial Data is accurate and consistent across business systems, validating and preparing Datasets in line with Data governance standards;
  • Act as a subject matter expert in SalesForce, providing user support, training, guidance, and continuous improvement recommendations;
  • Develop, maintain, and enhance Power BI dashboards, reports, and visualizations to improve visibility of commercial performance and decision-making;
  • Prepare and deliver reports, presentations, and commercial insights for sales meetings, customer reviews, and other business reviews;
  • Prepare reports linking SalesForce and Sales Data and support updates of R&D/NBO pipeline information for internal and external communications;
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to improve Data quality, analytical capabilities, reporting processes, and business tools;


A typical day will include analyzing commercial performance, maintaining dashboards, supporting sales and demand planning activities, attending sales meetings, validating Data quality, supporting SalesForce users, and delivering insights that support key business decisions.


Please consider that this role requires availability for occasional travel to other company sites, approximately once per year.



What you will need to succeed


As a Data Analyst – Commercial, you will need:

  • Bachelor’s Degree in Business, Information Systems, Data Management, or another analytical or business-related field;
  • +3 years of experience within an International Manufacturing or Industrial environment;
  • +3 years of experience in analytical or support roles within Sales, Commercial, or related business functions;
  • Proven experience developing and maintaining Power BI dashboards, reports, and Data visualizations that deliver actionable business insights;
  • Experience supporting demand planning, sales performance reviews, pipeline analysis, customer Data management, pricing, and commercial reporting;
  • Advanced Data collection, cleansing, validation, and reporting skills;
  • Experience working within Matrix Organizations and collaborating with Cross-Functional Teams (would be a plus);
  • Advanced Excel skills (including Pivot Tables, VLOOKUP, advanced functions, and graphs);
  • Experience with project management tools;
  • Knowledge of Python, SQL, and SharePoint management (would be a plus);
  • Ability to manage multiple priorities and deliver high-quality outputs in a fast-paced international environment;
  • Excellent communication skills – Fluency in English.


What the Company can offer you


Have the opportunity to join a cross-functional team in an international company with a multicultural working environment!



Next Steps


If you are interested in this opportunity, please send us your updated CV. If you are looking for another type of professional challenge, please contact us to discuss other career opportunities, always in complete confidence.

Title: Assistente Dentária - HeyDoc Norte Shopping
HTML:
Na HeyDoc, acreditamos que cuidar do sorriso e da confiança de cada pessoa é também cuidar da sua saúde e bem-estar.

Somos a rede de Clínicas de Medicina Dentária, Estética e Cirurgia Plástica do Grupo Lusíadas Saúde, unindo a excelência clínica à inovação tecnológica e à proximidade humana. Valorizamos a abertura, compaixão, lealdade e integridade — princípios que nos unem e que fazem da nossa equipa um verdadeiro reflexo do “Sabemos Cuidar”. Integrar a HeyDoc é crescer num projeto em expansão, com o apoio e a solidez de um grupo de referência, onde cada profissional encontra formação, desenvolvimento e propósito.

Atualmente, precisamos de aumentar o Talento na nossa Equipa.

Estamos à procura de Assistentes Dentária disponíveis para integrar a HeyDoc Norte Shopping.

Perfil pretendido:

  • Habilitações académicas ao nível do 12º ano de escolaridade (obrigatório);
  • Experiência na área da Medicina Dentária (obrigatório);
  • Formação Técnica de Assistentes Dentários (Preferencial);
  • Conhecimentos de informática na ótica do utilizador;
  • Facilidade de comunicação oral e escrita;
  • Disponibilidade para turnos rotativos e fins-de-semana.



Principais Responsabilidades:

  • Colaborar, sob supervisão técnica, nos cuidados aos clientes;
  • Proceder ao acompanhamento de clientes;
  • Prepara o material para a esterilização;
  • Assegurar a manutenção das condições de higiene no respetivo local de trabalho.



Benefícios de Ser Lusíadas

  • Dia de aniversário oferecido;
  • Seguro de saúde para o próprio;
  • Formação contínua e mobilidade interna – Academia Lusíadas | Knowledge Center;
  • Your Baby Matters | Kit maternidade;
  • Apoios ao regresso às aulas e Natal;
  • Clube Lusíadas Vantagens | Descontos exclusivos;
  • Seguro para a família e condições especiais para agregados familiares;
  • Apoio a filhos de colaboradores com necessidades especiais – Lusíadas em Família.



No Grupo Lusíadas Saúde promovemos um ambiente inclusivo e diverso, onde valorizamos as diferenças e garantimos igualdade de oportunidades para todas as pessoas, independentemente da sua identidade, origem ou condição.

Se partilha os nossos valores e quer integrar um projeto de referência na saúde em Portugal, envie o seu CV atualizado e junte-se a uma equipa que sabe cuidar!

Title: Banking Sector | Data Analyst
Description:
At Devoteam, we believe that technology with strong human values can actively drive change for the better. Discover how Tech for People unlocks the future, creating a positive impact on the people and the world around us. We are a global leading player in Digital Transformation for leading organisations across EMEA, with a revenue of €1B. We believe in transforming technology to create value for our clients, partners and employees in a world where technology is developed for people. We are proud of the culture we have built together. We are proud of our people at the service of technology. We are proud of our diverse environment. Because we are #TechforPeople. Join our multidisciplinary team of Cloud experts, Designers, Business consultants, Security experts, Engineers, Developers and other extraordinary talents, spread across more than 20 EMEA countries. Become one of our +10.000 tech and business leaders on cloud, data and cyber security. Let’s fuse creativity with technology together and build innovative solutions that actively change things for the better.

Job Description


Collect, clean, analyze, and interpret data to generate actionable insights that support strategic and operational decisions
Build, maintain, and monitor data pipelines, ensuring reliable extraction, processing, and loading of data
Work closely with end-users and cross-functional teams to ensure data accessibility, usability, and stability
Transform complex information into clear, engaging, and valuable deliverables for business stakeholders
Assess business changes and requirements, evaluating their impact and associated costs
Optimize code, queries, and data processes to improve efficiency and performance
Develop and maintain Airflow pipelines for data extraction, processing, and loading
Optimize Python scripts, SQL queries, and overall data workflows
Identify trends, anomalies, and opportunities to enhance user experience and anticipate needs
Deliver insights and visual representations that support daily decision-making
Understand business requirements and translate them into precise data solutions



Qualifications


Proven background in data analysis, with experience transforming raw data into actionable insights
Strong expertise in designing and maintaining Airflow pipelines for ETL processes
Proficiency in Python and SQL, with experience in Oracle Database environments and API development
Familiarity with Data Warehouses and large-scale data ecosystems
Experience with Git version control and working in Agile environments
Ability to optimize code, identify data patterns, and produce clear, engaging data outputs
Proficient in English



Additional Information

Devoteam Group works for equal opportunities, promoting its employees based on merit and actively fights against all forms of discrimination. We are convinced that diversity contributes to the creativity, dynamism and excellence of our organization. All of our vacancies are open to people with disabilities.

  • Optimize code, queries, and data processes to improve efficiency and performance
  • Develop and maintain Airflow pipelines for data extraction, processing, and loading
  • Optimize Python scripts, SQL queries, and overall data workflows
  • Identify trends, anomalies, and opportunities to enhance user experience and anticipate needs
  • Deliver insights and visual representations that support daily decision-making
  • Understand business requirements and translate them into precise data solutions


Qualifications

  • Proven background in data analysis, with experience transforming raw data into actionable insights
  • Strong expertise in designing and maintaining Airflow pipelines for ETL processes
  • Proficiency in Python and SQL, with experience in Oracle Database environments and API development
  • Familiarity with Data Warehouses and large-scale data ecosystems
  • Experience with Git version control and working in Agile environments
  • Ability to optimize code, identify data patterns, and produce clear, engaging data outputs
  • Proficient in English


Additional Information

Devoteam Group works for equal opportunities, promoting its employees based on merit and actively fights against all forms of discrimination. We are convinced that diversity contributes to the creativity, dynamism and excellence of our organization. All of our vacancies are open to people with disabilities.

Title: Data Analyst (m/f/d)
Place: Vila Nova de Gaia, Porto, Portugal
Description:
A NIW é uma empresa de Consultoria que atua em diversas áreas, com destaque para as Tecnologias de Informação. Fazemos parte da Salvador Caetano e a nossa missão é acompanhar, apoiar e assegurar os diversos negócios do Grupo.




Sabias que o setor automóvel é um dos setores de maior inovação e de reinvenção na atualidade? A tecnologia e a digitalização são fatores chave para a sua evolução.




Se estás à procura de desafios em diversas áreas, não gostas de rotina e queres evoluir, este é o lugar certo para ti! Contamos contigo para juntos fazermos avançar o negócio!




Sobre a Função:

Para integrar a equipa de Analytics, procuramos alguém responsável por garantir que os dados certos chegam, no formato certo, às pessoas certas — transformando dados brutos em informação fiável, bem estruturada e pronta para análise.




Transformação e preparação de dados

- Recolher, limpar e transformar dados provenientes de múltiplas fontes

- Extrair, limpar e transformar dados provenientes de múltiplas fontes (bases de dados, APIs, ficheiros, cloud), utilizando SQL como linguagem principal

- Garantir a qualidade, consistência e integridade dos dados ao longo de todo o pipeline analítico

- Documentar regras de negócio, transformações aplicadas e critérios de validação de dados

- Identificar e resolver proativamente problemas de qualidade de dados antes de chegarem ao modelo, assim como a preocupação constante da performance da solução




Modelação para o modelo semântico (Power BI)

- Construir e manter modelos semânticos robustos no Power BI, de acordo com as normas e boas práticas definidas na equipa

- Otimizar o modelo para performance — redução de cardinalidade, gestão de DirectQuery vs Import, medidas DAX, etc

- Assegurar que o modelo semântico é reutilizável, escalável e auditável por outros elementos da equipa




Análise de dados

- Questionar os dados antes de os apresentar — validar fontes, identificar inconsistências e garantir que os números fazem sentido de negócio




Colaboração com equipas de dados

- Trabalhar com Data Engineers na definição de contratos de dados e estrutura de tabelas analíticas

- Explorar e consumir dados a partir de Lakehouses e Warehouses no Microsoft Fabric




O que valorizamos:

- Experiência de 2–3 anos em funções de análise ou engenharia analítica de dados

- Experiência intermédia/avançada com SQL — joins, CTEs, agregações, subqueries

- Experiência prática com Power BI e familiaridade com o ecossistema Microsoft Fabric

- Bons conhecimentos em construção de modelos dimensionais no Power BI — relações, hierarquias, tabelas de datas

- Bons conhecimentos em medidas de complexidade média/avançada — time intelligence, CALCULATE, variáveis, iteradores

- Boa capacidade de comunicação escrita e oral, adaptando o discurso à audiência

- Orientação para a qualidade — preocupação genuína com a fiabilidade e rastreabilidade dos dados

- Curiosidade analítica — vai além da pergunta inicial e procura o contexto que dá sentido aos números

- Proatividade e pensamento crítico




O que oferecemos:

- Dia extra de férias

- Soluções de trabalho flexível

- Comparticipação das despesas de saúde extensível ao agregado familiar

- Atribuição de subsídios de apoio aos projetos de vida pessoal e familiar

- Programa de benefícios flexíveis

- Descontos na compra de viaturas representadas pelo Grupo

- Vantagens na aquisição de produtos/serviços em diversas áreas (lazer, tecnologia, bem-estar, educação…)

- Seguro de vida

- Fundo de pensões

- Formação e desenvolvimento contínuo

- Oportunidades de progressão de carreira num grupo com forte representação nacional e internacional

- Integração em equipa dinâmica com espírito jovem.




Na Salvador Caetano ajudamos as Pessoas a moverem-se.




Na Salvador Caetano queremos contribuir para um futuro inclusivo e representativo. Acreditamos que a diversidade de talento empodera as nossas equipas, cria ambientes propícios à inovação e contribui para a evolução do negócio. Aqui incentivamos a diferença e incluímo-la. Independentemente da idade, género, etnia ou religião, promovemos a igualdade de oportunidades e garante a integração numa cultura baseada na dignidade e respeito por todas as pessoas.

Title: Advanced Junior Data Analyst
Description:
Who are we ?

Quanteam, founding entity of RAINBOW PARTNERS, is a consulting firm specialized in Banking and Financial Services. With more than 1200 consultants across 10 countries, we combine business and IT expertise to support leading institutions in transformation projects.

Our core areas:

➡Quantitative Finance

➡Risk & Compliance

➡Operations & Finance

➡Transformation & Organization

➡ Information Systems.




🔎 We are looking for an Advanced Junior Data Analyst.




📝 MAIN TASKS

Automation of risk management processes and tools, using Python and while following best programming practices
Analyse, re-engineer processes and implement in Python to harmonize such processes, improve efficiency and reduce operational risk related to existing practices.




🧩 YOUR PROFILE AND SKILLS

Master's degree in finance, Mathematics, (Computer) Science or Engineering.
Hands-on experience from roles in financial markets and risk.
2 to 5 years of working experience in a relevant finance or data analysis field.
Programming skills: a solid working knowledge of Python is required, focused on data analysis with strong experience in packages like numpy and pandas.
Ability to gather, integrate, process and simplify large amounts of information
Ability to ensure the relevancy of the work done, the correct presentation of details and the full accomplishment of tasks.
Value and integrate client's feedback to improve products, services and processes.
Aims at increasing client satisfaction and anticipating their needs.
Ability to anticipate and takes initiative to answer a particular situation, to learn from experiences and to deploy curiosity about topics outside their immediate scope.
Ability to manage time, to plan, structure, prioritize and coordinate activities and resources effectively to reach objectives.
Analyze structured data.
Knowledge of risk management.
Knowledge of cross-margining.
Translate users' requirements into deliverables.




🎁 WHAT WE OFFER

This role offers a gross annual salary between 20.000€ to 31.000€, defined according to the candidate’s experience and competencies.
Hybrid position based in Porto.
Permanent contract (CTI).
Meal allowance.
Health Insurance.
Extra holiday: Christmas Eve or New Year’s Eve.
Access to Quanteam Academy for continuous learning and certifications.
Elevate Program to support professional development and career growth.
Career progression plan.
Ongoing follow-up and technical support provided by a Consultant Expert.

Title: IT Helpdesk Technician
Description:
Descrição da Empresa

Com mais de 30 anos de experiência, a Rumos Consulting atua na área da Consultoria em Tecnologias de Informação, entregando soluções nas áreas de Modern Workplace & Apps, Data, Analytics & Artificial Intelligence, Digital Business Automation, Enterprise Service Management, Digital Design Strategy & Marketing, Project Management Office, Workplace Managed Services, IT Outsourcing e Licensing. As parcerias tecnológicas da Rumos Consulting permitem uma entrega de serviços e projetos de forma certificada, seguindo as melhores práticas do mercado.

Descrição da Função

Na sequência do crescimento da nossa equipa recrutamos: IT Helpdesk Technician Perfil: - Habilitações Académicas ao nível do 12.º ano; - Experiência profissional mínima de 2 anos em suporte técnico presencial; - Experiência em criação de acessos no Active Directory e preparação de equipamentos para novos colaboradores; - Experiência em troubleshooting e gestão de redes Windows; - Experiência em gestão de backups, equipamentos informáticos e impressoras; - Bons conhecimentos de Inglês; - Capacidade de análise e atenção ao detalhe; - Boa capacidade de comunicação, dinamismo e proatividade; - Gosto pelo trabalho em equipa e aprendizagem contínua. Local: Porto (Presencial) Trabalhar connosco: - Com mais de 30 anos de experiência, a Rumos Consulting conta com uma equipa de profissionais especializados em TI; - Na Rumos Consulting, os consultores integram projetos altamente desafiantes, com base em tecnologia de ponta e nos mais diversos setores de atividade; - Os consultores Rumos Consulting têm acesso a um plano de formação certificada, o que lhes proporciona uma constante atualização de competências técnicas; - A Rumos Consulting, enquanto empregador, dispõe de oportunidades de emprego com base na equidade, integridade e diversidade. Tendo por base estes valores, trabalhamos para que que nenhuma pessoa seja discriminada com base na idade, grau de deficiência, género, estado civil, gravidez e maternidade, raça, crenças ou orientação sexual. Acreditamos nas capacidades de todos, porque temos no nosso ADN espírito de equipa e de entreajuda, empatia e respeito. As candidaturas que reúnam o perfil solicitado serão tratadas logo após a sua receção, ficando as restantes registadas em base de dados para futuras oportunidades. A Rumos Consulting, S.A. é a entidade responsável pelo tratamento dos dados pessoais recolhidos neste processo de candidatura. Pode exercer todos os seus direitos de titular dos dados pessoais diretamente no Portal de Emprego da Rumos, utilizando o seu endereço de e-mail de registo ou o que referenciou no seu CV. Caso não tenha a sua password presente poderá recuperá-la para esse endereço de e-mail. Se preferir pode sempre contactar diretamente a Rumos Consulting, S.A. para exercício dos seus direitos de titular de dados.

Matosinhos, Portugal

Informação exclusiva JobMatch Descrição da Empresa Fundada em 1995, a Noesis é uma consultora tecnológica internacional de referência, que oferece serviços e soluções para apoiar os seus clientes na transformação digital e no desenvolvimento dos seus negócios. Descrição Do Anúncio

Fundada em 1995, a Noesis é uma consultora internacional, na área de sistemas de informação que se centra em criar valor para os seus clientes através de quatro áreas de foco – infraestruturas, quality assurance, software e pessoas, com o apoio das sete unidades de negócio.

A oferta da Noesis visa aumentar a competitividade, facilitar a gestão, reduzir os custos e otimizar processos dos nossos clientes, atuando nos principais setores como as telecomunicações, o setor financeiro, administração pública, retalho, serviços e a indústria.

Atualmente, contamos com o potencial de mais de 700 talentos e 8 escritórios (Lisboa, Porto, Coimbra, Bélgica, Brasil, Irlanda, Holanda e USA) para levarem a Noesis a criar e desenvolver soluções inovadoras e sustentáveis que impulsionem o crescimento dos seus clientes.

Apostamos na valorização contínua das nossas equipas e na criação de laços que resultam em uma forte retenção de talentos. Temos como principal pilar as nossas pessoas, no qual nos focamos na inovação, sustentabilidade e I&D. Como tal, fomentamos o conhecimento e o desenvolvimento das competências únicas das nossas equipas.

A NOESIS Procura Profissionais Com o Seguinte Perfil


Licenciatura em Engenharia Informática ou equivalente;
Experiência mínima de 2 anos em projectos de Suporte BI, análise e resolução de incidentes;
Experiência efectiva com ferramentas de Business Intelligence, tais como: OBIEE, Microstrategy, Microsoft (Integration, Analysis e Reporting Services), ODI;
Conhecimentos de programação em PL/SQL;
Experiência em processos ETL;
Interesse pela área de Suporte;
Autonomia e proactividade;
Espírito de equipa;
Bons conhecimentos de Inglês.
